<script>

function openPopupMessageSize(weight, height, message, func, closeModal) {
	try { console.log("openPopupMessageHeight :" + height); } catch(e) {}
	var html = "";
	html += "<div id=\"popupMessage\" class=\"pop_inner_wrap no_tit\" style=\"width:"+weight+"px; height:"+height+"px; display:none;\">";
	html += "	<div class=\"mes_wrap\">";
	html += message;
	html += "	</div>";
	html += "	<div class=\"pop_inner_btn_wrap\">";
	html += "		<button type=\"button\" class=\"confirmPopup btn_confirm\">Confirm</button>";
	html += "	</div>";
	html += "</div>";

	$(html).appendTo("body");

	try { console.log("openPopupMessageSize :" + html); } catch(e) {}
	var option = {
		layer:"popupMessage",
		modal:$("#mask").is(":hidden") ? true : false,
		confirmBtn:"confirmPopup",
		func:func,
		closeModal:closeModal
	};

	popupCenterLayer(option);
}

$(document).ready(function() {

	var accessIdList = '[COMMON, SEC_EMP, B2T_STAFF, B2T_ADVANCED_VIEWER]';
	
	$("a").tooltip({
		tooltipClass:"tooltip",
		track:true,
		position:{
			my:"left top-0",
			at:"right top"
		},
		show:{
			effect:"fadeIn",
			delay:100
		},
		hide:{
			effect:"fadeOut",
			delay:50
		}
	});
	
	var curUrl = location.href;
	if(curUrl.indexOf("/ts/ticket") >= 0){
		$("#btnUnifiedSearch").hide();
	}

	$(".mainCon1 .con a").each(function(q) {
		$(this).hover(function() {
			$(this).find(".over").stop(true, true).fadeIn('fast');
		}, function() {
			$(this).find(".over").stop(true, true).fadeOut('fast');
		});
	});

	$("#reportDiv").click(function() {
		window.location.href = '/b2t/ts/report/btspReport.do?method=ticketClosedStatusMonthly';
	});

	$("#settingDiv").click(function() {
		
		window.location.href = "/b2t/ts/admin/queueMgmt.do?method=queueMgmtList&menuId=N201511240335382006871_SWHQ";
	});


	$(".myinfo_fold").click(function() {
		$("#myinformation").empty();
		$.ajax({
			type: 'get',
			async : true,
			url: '/b2t/login.do?method=getMyProfileInfo&menuKey=Y',
			dataType : "json",
			data  : null,
			success: function(data){

				var userInfo = data.jsonResult;
				
				if(userInfo != null){
					var temp = "";
					var telTemp = userInfo.attrs.TEL_NO2+"-"+userInfo.attrs.TEL_NO; 
					var cellTemp =userInfo.attrs.TEL_NO2+"-"+userInfo.attrs.CELLPHONENO;

					temp +="<ul>";
					temp +="<li>";
					temp +="<h3>Name</h3>";
					temp +="<p>"+userInfo.attrs.USER_NM+"("+userInfo.attrs.USER_LOGIN_ID+")</p>";
					temp +="</li>";
					temp +="<li>";	
					temp +="<h3>Phone</h3>";
					temp +="<p>"+telTemp+"</p>";
					temp +="</li>";
					temp +="<li>";
					temp +="<h3>CellPhone</h3>";
					temp +="<p>"+cellTemp+"</p>";
					temp +="</li>";
					temp +="<li>";
					temp +="<h3>E-mail</h3>";
					temp +="<p>"+userInfo.attrs.USER_EMAIL+"</p>";
					temp +="</li>";
					temp +="<li>";
					if(userInfo.attrs.SEC_EMP_YN == 'N'){
						temp +="<h3>ACCOUNT NAME</h3><p>"+userInfo.attrs.ACCOUNT_NM+"</p>";
					}else{
						temp +="<h3>Subsidiary</h3><p>"+userInfo.attrs.SEC_ORG_ID+"</p>";
					}
					temp +="</li>";
					temp +="<li>";
					temp +="<h3>Country</h3>";
					temp +="<p>"+userInfo.attrs.COUNTRY_CD+"</p>";
					temp +="</li>";
					temp +="</ul>";
					
					//팝업정보 세팅
					$("#myinformation").html(temp);
					//팝업오픈
					$(".myinfo_spread_wrap").addClass("open");
				}
			},
			error: function(data, status, err){
				alert("An error occurred.");
			}
		});
	
	});

	$(".btn_spread_close").click(function() {
		$(".myinfo_spread_wrap").removeClass("open");
	});

});

function goAlram() {
	var alram = 
		"BTSP Preventive Maintenance<br><br>" 
		+"Please be advised that BTSP Preventive Maintenance has been scheduled as below.<br>"
		+"The BTSP system will not be available during this time.<br>"
		+"Preventive Maintenance time (Korean time:GMT+9)<br>"
		+" ○ Start    :  2016/02/21(Sun)   08:00<br>"
		+" ○ Finish  :  2016/02/21(Sun)   17:00<br><br>"
		+"Posted by : BTSP Team";
	openPopupMessageSize(590, 270, alram, null);
	setTimeout('focusConfirm()', 1000);
}

function focusConfirm() {
	$(".btn_confirm").focus();
}


function goLogin() {
	//goAlram();
	window.location.href = "/b2t/main.do?method=loginMain";
	//window.location.href = "/b2t/index.jsp";
}

function goUrl(gubun) {
	var url = "";
	
	if(4==gubun){
		var httpPrefix = "";
		var localDomain = "btsp.samsunggsbn.com";
		
		
			httpPrefix = "https://"+ localDomain;
		
		
		callUserProfilePage(httpPrefix);
	} else{
		if(1==gubun) {
			url = "/b2t/ts/ticketView.do?method=page";
			clearLastView();
		} else if(2==gubun){
			url = "/b2t/ts/contents/download.do?method=getDownloadSubMainPage";
		} else if(3==gubun){	
			url = "/b2t/ts/contents/community.do?method=getCommunitySubMainPage";
		} else if(5==gubun) {
			url = "/b2t/ts/contents/issue.do?method=getIssueListPage";
		} else if(6==gubun) {
			url = "/b2t/ts/contents/onsite.do?method=page";
		} else if(7==gubun) {
			//url = "/b2t/ts/contents/kedb.do?method=page";
			url = "/b2t/ts/contents/kmdb.do?method=getKmdbNLListPage";		// 수정
		} else if(9==gubun) {
			url = "/b2t/login.do?method=logout";
		}
		
		if(9==gubun){
			 window.location.replace(url);
		} else{
			 window.location.href=url;
		}
	}
}

function snConversionPopup() {

	//var param = "&licenseKey="+$("#detailLicense").val()+"&popup=I";
	//var winUrl = '/b2t/mc/customization.do?method=getSNConversionPopupPage&'+param;
	var winUrl = '/b2t/mc/deviceListManagement.do?method=getSNConversionPopupPage&';

	cw=screen.availWidth;     //화면 넓이
	ch=screen.availHeight;    //화면 높이
	
	sw=900;    //띄울 창의 넓이
	sh=650;    //띄울 창의 높이
	
	ml=(cw-sw)/2;        //가운데 띄우기위한 창의 x위치
	mt=(ch-sh)/2;         //가운데 띄우기위한 창의 y위치

	window.open(winUrl,'win','width='+sw+',height='+sh+',top='+mt+',left='+ml+',resizable=no,scrollbars=yes');
}

			jQuery(this).find(".over").stop(true, true).fadeOut('fast');
		})
	})
})

</style>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		$("#tickets_Info1, #tickets_Info2").each(function(){
			$(this).addClass("	ui-accordion ui-widget ui-helper-reset");
		});

		$("#tickets_Info1 > h2").each(function(index){
			var panel = $(this).next();
			$(this).addClass("contentHeader ui-accordion-header ui-state-default ui-corner-top ui-accordion-iconsui-accordion-header ui-state-default  ui-corner-top ui-accordion-iconsr");
			panel.addClass("ui-accordion-content ui-helper-reset ui-widget-content ui-corner-bottom");

			var span = $("<span class='ui-accordion-header-icon ui-icon ui-icon-triangle-1-s'></span>");
			span.appendTo($(this));
			// Basic/Product/Site 모두 펼친 상태가 Default 로 수정
			//if(index == 0){
				$(this).addClass("ui-accordion-header-active ui-state-active");
				panel.addClass("contentOpened");
			//}else{
			//	panel.hide();
			//}
		});

		$("#tickets_Info2 > h2").each(function(index){
			var panel = $(this).next();
			$(this).addClass("contentHeader ui-accordion-header ui-state-default ui-corner-top ui-accordion-iconsui-accordion-header ui-state-default  ui-corner-top ui-accordion-iconsr ui-accordion-header-active ui-state-active");
			panel.addClass("ui-accordion-content ui-helper-reset ui-widget-content ui-corner-bottom");

			var span = $("<span class='ui-accordion-header-icon ui-icon ui-icon-triangle-1-s'></span>");
			span.appendTo($(this));
		});

		$(".contentHeader").click(function(){
			var panel = $(this).next();
			var activeHeaderClass = "ui-accordion-header-active ui-state-active";
			if($(this).hasClass("ui-state-active")){
				$(this).removeClass(activeHeaderClass);
				panel.removeClass("contentOpened");
				panel.hide();
			}else{
				$(this).addClass(activeHeaderClass);
				panel.addClass("contentOpened");
				panel.show();
			}
		}).mouseout(function(){
			$(this).removeClass("ui-state-hover ");
		}).mouseover(function(){
			$(this).addClass("ui-state-hover ");
		});

		//세로 스크롤 컨텐츠를 위한 높이 조정
		// - 푸터 height:43px, 하단 버튼 영역 height:100px
		var winHeight = $(window).height();
		$('.fl_L').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.contents_q').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.contents_c').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.fixed_ticket_left').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.spread_right').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.creat_ticket').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.creat_ticket_wrap').css('height', winHeight - 57);
		$('.fixed_menu_left').css('height', winHeight);

		$(window).resize(function() {
			var reWinHeight = $(window).height();

			$('.fl_L').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.contents_q').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.contents_c').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.fixed_ticket_left').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.spread_right').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.creat_ticket').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.creat_ticket_wrap').css('height', reWinHeight - 57);
			$('.fixed_menu_left').css('height', reWinHeight);
		});

		$("#menuArrow").click(function() {
			if ($(this).hasClass("open")) {
				$(this).removeClass("open");
				$(this).addClass("close");
				$(".creat_ticket_wrap").removeClass("close");
				$(".creat_ticket_wrap").addClass("open");
				$(".contents_q.list").removeClass("close").addClass("open");

			} else {
				$(this).removeClass("close");
				$(this).addClass("open");
				$(".creat_ticket_wrap").removeClass("open");
				$(".creat_ticket_wrap").addClass("close");
				$(".contents_q.list").removeClass("open").addClass("close");

			}
		});

		$("#macroSeqNo").selectmenu();
		$("#macroSeqNo").selectmenu({
			width : "200px",
			position : {
				my : "left bottom",
				at : "left top"
			},
			change : function(event, ui) {
				getTicketFormMacroValueList();
			}
		});
		
		var sessionUserId = "uDebWvoKyazD6yJN4Epp7wTAOGEETAOGEE";
		if(sessionUserId != ""){
			initPageViewList(sessionUserId);
		}

	});

	function getTicketFormMacroValueList() {
		if(isEmpty($("#macroSeqNo").val())) {
			return;
		}

		$.ajax({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticket.do?method=getTicketFormMacroValueList"),
			dataType:"json",
			data:{
				seqNo:$("#macroSeqNo").val(),
				ticketNo:$("#ticketNo").val()
			},
			cache:false,
			contentType:"application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8",
			beforeSend:function() {
			},
			complete:function() {
			},
			success:function(json) {
				var result = json.result;
				var message = json.message;

				if(result == "0") {
					var ticketFormMacroValueVOList = json.ticketFormMacroValueVOList;
					var ticketFormMacroValueVOList2 = new Array();

					$.each(ticketFormMacroValueVOList, function(index, ticketFormMacroValueVO) {
						var fieldCd = ticketFormMacroValueVO.fieldCd;
						var macroVal = ticketFormMacroValueVO.macroVal;
						var macroValEtc = ticketFormMacroValueVO.macroValEtc;

						//alert("fieldCd : " + fieldCd + ", macroVal : " + macroVal);//fieldCd : addCc, macroVal : UR-0133828 
						

						var field = $("#" + fieldCd);

						if(field.length == 1 || checkCommonFieldYn(fieldCd)) {
							if(fieldCd == "commentMode") {
								if($("#commentType").length == 1) {
									if($("button[name='commentType0']:eq(1)").is(":visible")) {
										if(macroVal == "01") {
											if(!$("button[name='commentType0']:eq(0)").hasClass("on")) {
												$("button[name='commentType0']:eq(0)").trigger("click");
											}
										} else if(macroVal == "02") {
											if(!$("button[name='commentType0']:eq(1)").hasClass("on")) {
												$("button[name='commentType0']:eq(1)").trigger("click");
											}
										}
									}
								}
							} else if(fieldCd == "ticketCommentText") {
								
								cafe.setContent("cafeDemo", macroVal);
							} else if(checkMacroSetAvailable()) {
								if(fieldCd == "addCc") {
									if(addCc) {
										addCc(macroVal, macroValEtc);
									}
								} else if(fieldCd == "addTags") {
									$("#fullTagNm").val(macroVal);
								} else {
									if(fieldCd == "accountId") {
										/* 공통에서 세팅 안함 */
									} else if(field.hasClass("sel_block") && false) {	//FROG : selectmenu 반영시 false 삭제
										field.val(macroVal);
										field.selectmenu("refresh");
									} else {
										field.val(macroVal);
									}
								}
							}
						}

						if(!checkCommonFieldYn(fieldCd)) {
							ticketFormMacroValueVOList2.push(ticketFormMacroValueVO);
						}
					});

					if(checkMacroSetAvailable() && setBizMacro) {
						setBizMacro(ticketFormMacroValueVOList2);
					}
				} else {
					alert(message);
				}
			},
			error:function(request, status, error) {
				alert(error);
			}
		});
	}

	function checkCommonFieldYn(fieldCd) {
		if(fieldCd == "ticketCommentText" || fieldCd == "commentMode" || fieldCd == "priorityCd" || fieldCd == "addCc" || fieldCd == "addTags") {
			return true;
		} else {
			return false;
		}
	}

	function checkMacroSetAvailable() {
		
			
			
				
					
					
					
						return false;
					
				
			
			
		
	}

	function openItemPanel(objId){
		var panel = $("#" + objId).parent().parent().parent();
		if(!panel.hasClass("contentOpened")){
			panel.prev().trigger("click");
		}
	}

	function closedPrdCreateFail(){
		var message = "<p>Creating Mobile / VD / HA product related ticket is no longer</p>"
			+"<p>available here.</p>"
			+"<p>Please move to <a style=\"color:#328ede; \" href=\"https://sec-b2b.my.salesforce.com\" target=_blank><U>`Service Cloud</a>`</U></p>"
			+"<p>&nbsp;</p>"
			+"<p>Thanks. </p>";
			openPopupMessageSize('430','190',message, function(){
		});
	}

	function openPopupMessageSize(weight, height, message, func, closeModal) {
		try { console.log("openPopupMessageHeight :" + height); } catch(e) {}
		var html = "";
		html += "<div id=\"popupMessage\" class=\"pop_inner_wrap no_tit\" style=\"width:"+weight+"px; height:"+height+"px; display:none; FONT-SIZE: 9pt;\">";
		html += "	<div class=\"mes_wrap\">";
		html += message;
		html += "	</div>";
		html += "	<div class=\"pop_inner_btn_wrap\">";
		html += "		<button type=\"button\" class=\"confirmPopup btn_confirm\">Confirm</button>";
		html += "	</div>";
		html += "</div>";

		$(html).appendTo("body");

		try { console.log("openPopupMessageSize :" + html); } catch(e) {}

		var option = {
			layer:"popupMessage",
			modal:$("#mask").is(":hidden") ? true : false,
			confirmBtn:"confirmPopup",
			func:func,
			closeModal:closeModal
		};

		popupCenterLayer(option);
	}

$(document).ready(function() {

	$("#dirSearchChar1").hide();
	$("#dirSearchChar2").hide();
	$("#dirSearchChar3").hide();
		
	
	
	

	var fileMsg =  'The file size has exceeded the maximum limit. ';
	var fileLbl =  '(1.8 GB';
	var totalFileLbl =  '(1.8 GB';
	$("#mainForm input[name='attcFile']").MultiFile({
		list:"#attcFileList",	//파일목록을 출력할 요소 지정가능
		accept:"xlsb|alz|apk|asf|avi|bin|bmp|csv|doc|docx|eml|flv|gif|gul|gz|hds|hwp|jpeg|jpg|mht|mka|mkv|mov|mp4|mpeg|mpg|msg|par|pca|pcap|pdf|pem|png|ppt|pptx|ps|psd|rar|rtf|swf|tar|tif|txt|url|wmf|wmv|xls|xlsx|zip|log|xml|pcapng|cap|dmp|5vw|trc0|trc1|enc|trc|fdc|syc|bfr|tr1|snoop|dxf|sfs|z01|z02|z03|z04|z05|z06|z07|z08|z09|z10|pub|ghs|iso|dll|dwg|rfa|dcm|raw|map|evtx|db3|mta|orig|gxr|egg|a00|a01|a02|a03|a04|a05|a06|a07|a08|a09|a10|a11|a12|a13|a14|a15|a16|a17|a18|a19|a20|z00|z11|z12|z13|z14|z15|z16|z17|z18|z19|z20|tgz|7z|prn|001|002|003|004|005|006|007|008|009|010|011|012|013|014|015|016|017|018|019|020|lz4|xcg",
		maxfile:1887437, //각 파일 최대 업로드 (1.8 GB= 1887437 KB= 1932735488 B)
		maxsize:4194304, // 전체 파일 최대 업로드 (4 GB= 4194304 KB = 4294967296 B)
		STRING:{ toomuch: fileMsg+totalFileLbl,
						toobig: fileMsg+fileLbl}
	});
	
	$("#resolutionSummaryBtn").click(function(e) {
		e.preventDefault();

		
			

				if(navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().indexOf("msie")!= -1 || navigator.userAgent.indexOf("rv:11.0") > -1){ // 브라우져가 IE인 경우
					//IE9
					var width = 1000;
					var height = 722;
				}else{
					//chrome
					var width = 1004;
					var height = 727;
				}

				var left = (screen.width - width) / 2;
				var top = (screen.height - height) / 2;

				if(left < 0) {
					left = 0;
				}

				if(top < 0) {
					top = 0;
				}

				var paramRslt = '&resolutionId=&ticketNo=' + $("#ticketNo").val();
				var winUrlRslt = '/b2t/ts/ticket/resolutionReportNw.do?method=getResolutionSummaryPopup'+paramRslt;
				var winRslt = window.open(winUrlRslt, "resolutionSummary", "left=" + left + ", top=" + top + ", width=" + width + ", height=" + height + ", resizable=no");
				winRslt.focus();
			
			
			
			
		
	});

	$("#resolutionSummaryCloseBtn").click(function() {
		$(".spread_right").removeClass("open");
		$(".spread_right").addClass("close");
		$(".fl_L").removeClass("sum_open");
	});

	$("button[name='commentType0']").click(function() {
		if($(this).index() == 1 && $(this).hasClass("disableProc")) {
			
				
				
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('If the ticket requester is an internal user, <br><b>Public note is not necessary.</b><br>Please add your message by using an <b>Internal note.</b>');
				
				
			
		} else {
			if($(this).index() == 1) {
				$("input[name='receiver']").attr("checked", false);
				$("#receiverCountBlock").hide();
				$("#receiverCount").text("0");
				$("#receiverList").hide();
			} else if($(this).index() == 0 && $(this).hasClass("on") && $("input[name='receiver']").length > 0) {
				$("#receiverList").toggle();
			}

			$("button[name='commentType0']").removeClass("on").addClass("off");
			$(this).removeClass("off").addClass("on");
		}
	});

	$("input[name='receiver']").click(function() {
		var receiverCount = $("input[name='receiver']:checked").length;
		$("#receiverCount").text(receiverCount);

		if(receiverCount > 0) {
			$("#receiverCountBlock").show();
		} else {
			$("#receiverCountBlock").hide();
		}
	});

	$(".refusalChkBtn").click(function() {
		$(this).hide();
		if($(this).index() == 0) {
			$("#emailOff").show();
			$("#isRefusalChk").val("on");
		} else {
			$("#emailOn").show();
			$("#isRefusalChk").val("off");
		}
	});

	setTicketCcVOListSeq();

	$("#ccsUserName").autocomplete({
		source : function(request, response) {
			$.ajax({
				url : ctx + "/ts/ticket.do?method=getCCsUserList",
				type : "post",
				dataType : "json",
				data:
				{
					"keyword" : $("#ccsUserName").val()
				},
				beforeSend : function() {
				},
				complete : function() {
				},
				success : function(data) {
					var result = data.dataList;
					response(result);
				},
				error : function(data) {
					alert("error occured.");
				}
			});
		},
		select: function( event, ui ) {
			$("#ccsUserName").val("");
			addCc(ui.item.referId, ui.item.label);
			return false;
		}
	});
	
	//L1 큐  search가져오기
	var srchCharList1 = 0;
	$("#dirSearchChar1").autocomplete({
		minLength : 1,
		source : function(request, response) {
			
			var tmp = $("#bizUnitCd").val();
			var tmpBizUnitCd  = tmp === 'CC' ? '': tmp;

			$("#grpCharger1").prop("disabled", true);
			
			$.ajax({
				url : ctx + "/ts/ticket.do?method=getQList",
				type : 'post',
				dataType : 'json', 
				data : {
					"ticketNo": $("#ticketNo").val()
					, "secorgId": $("#secorgId").val()
					, "bizUnitCd" : tmpBizUnitCd
					, "bizStageCd": "L1"
					, "qPram" : "L1"
					, "userNm":$("#dirSearchChar1").val()
					, "emailAddr":$("#dirSearchChar1").val()
				},
				success : function(data) {
					if(data.dataList.resultsize > 0){
						srchCharList1 = data.dataList.resultsize;
						$("#grpCharger1").prop("disabled", false);
						$("#dirSearchChar1").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading" );
						response($.map(data.dataList.data, function (c) {
							//console.log(c) ;
							return {
								label  : "【 "+restoreXSS(c.agentGrpNm)+"】 "+c.userNm+" ("+c.userLoginId+")",
								value : "【 "+restoreXSS(c.agentGrpNm)+"】 "+c.userNm+" ("+c.userLoginId+")",
								bizStageCd : c.bizStageCd,
								agentGrpId : c.agentGrpId,
								userId : c.userId
							};
						}));
					}else{
						$("#grpCharger1").prop("disabled", false);
						$("#dirSearchChar1").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading");
						srchCharList1 = 0;
						return false;
					}
				},
				error : function(data) {
					openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
				}
			});
		},
		select: function( event, ui ) {
			selectQueueSearchData(1, ui.item.bizStageCd, ui.item.agentGrpId, ui.item.userId);
			return false;
		}
	});
	
	$("#dirSearchChar1").on("keydown", function(event) { 
		if (event.keyCode == '13' && srchCharList1 == 0) {
			event.preventDefault();
			msgSearchCharger(1);
		}
	});
	
	$("#dirSearchChar1").on("click", function(event) {
		event.preventDefault();
		var dirSearchCharVal = $("#dirSearchChar1").val();
		if(dirSearchCharVal == ""){
			//값이 없을 경우만 체크
			setQueueSearchData(1, "dirChar1", true);
		}
	});
	
	//L2 큐  search가져오기
	var srchCharList2 = 0;
	$("#dirSearchChar2").autocomplete({
		minLength : 1,
		source : function(request, response) {
			
			var tmp = $("#bizUnitCd").val();
			var tmpBizUnitCd  = tmp === 'CC' ? '': tmp;
			$("#grpCharger2").prop("disabled", true);
			
			$.ajax({
				url : ctx + "/ts/ticket.do?method=getQList",
				type : 'post',
				dataType : 'json',
				data : {
					"ticketNo": $("#ticketNo").val()
					, "secorgId": $("#secorgId").val()
					, "bizUnitCd" : tmpBizUnitCd
					, "bizStageCd": "L2"
					, "qPram" : "L2"
					, "userNm":$("#dirSearchChar2").val()
					, "emailAddr":$("#dirSearchChar2").val()
				},
				success : function(data) {
					if(data.dataList.resultsize > 0){
						srchCharList2 = data.dataList.resultsize;
						$("#grpCharger2").prop("disabled", false);
						$("#dirSearchChar2").removeClass("ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading");
						response($.map(data.dataList.data, function (c) {
							return {
								label  : "【 "+restoreXSS(c.agentGrpNm)+"】 "+c.userNm+" ("+c.userLoginId+")",
								value : "【 "+restoreXSS(c.agentGrpNm)+"】 "+c.userNm+" ("+c.userLoginId+")",
								bizStageCd : c.bizStageCd,
								agentGrpId : c.agentGrpId,
								userId : c.userId
							};
						}));
					}else{
						$("#grpCharger2").prop("disabled", false);
						$("#dirSearchChar2").removeClass("ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading");
						srchCharList2 = 0;
						return false;
					}
				},
				error : function(data) {
					openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
				}
			});
		},
		select: function( event, ui ) {
			selectQueueSearchData(2, ui.item.bizStageCd, ui.item.agentGrpId, ui.item.userId);
			return false;
		}
	});

	$("#dirSearchChar2").on("keydown", function(event) {
		if (event.keyCode == '13' && srchCharList2 == 0) {
			event.preventDefault();
			msgSearchCharger(2);
		} 
	});
	
	$("#dirSearchChar2").on("click", function(event) {
		event.preventDefault();
		var dirSearchCharVal = $("#dirSearchChar2").val();
		if(dirSearchCharVal == ""){
			//값이 없을 경우만 체크
			setQueueSearchData(2, "dirChar2", true);
		}
	}); 

	//L3 큐  search가져오기
	var srchCharList3 = 0;
	$("#dirSearchChar3").autocomplete({
		minLength : 1,
		source : function(request, response) {
			var tmp = $("#bizUnitCd").val();
			var tmpBizUnitCd  = tmp === 'CC' ? '': tmp;

			$("#grpCharger3").prop("disabled", true);

			$.ajax({
				url : ctx + "/ts/ticket.do?method=getQList",
				type : 'post',
				dataType : 'json', 
				data : {
					"ticketNo": $("#ticketNo").val()
					, "secorgId": $("#secorgId").val()
					, "bizUnitCd" : tmpBizUnitCd
					, "bizStageCd": "L3"
					, "qPram" : "L3"
					, "userNm":$("#dirSearchChar3").val()
					, "emailAddr":$("#dirSearchChar3").val()
				},
				success : function(data) {
					if(data.dataList.resultsize > 0){
						srchCharList3 = data.dataList.resultsize;
						$("#grpCharger3").prop("disabled", false);
						$("#dirSearchChar3").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading" );
						response($.map(data.dataList.data, function (c) {
							return {
								label  : "【 "+restoreXSS(c.agentGrpNm)+"】 "+c.userNm+" ("+c.userLoginId+")",
								value : "【 "+restoreXSS(c.agentGrpNm)+"】 "+c.userNm+" ("+c.userLoginId+")",
								bizStageCd : c.bizStageCd,
								agentGrpId : c.agentGrpId,
								userId : c.userId
							};
						}));
					
					}else{
						$("#grpCharger3").prop("disabled", false);
						$("#dirSearchChar3").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading" );
						srchCharList3 = 0;
						return false;
					}
				},
				error : function(data) {
					openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
				}
			});
		},
		select: function(event, ui ) {
			selectQueueSearchData(3, ui.item.bizStageCd, ui.item.agentGrpId, ui.item.userId);
			return false;
		}
	});

	$("#refTicketNoKeyword").autocomplete({
		source:function(request, response) {
			$.ajax({
				url:getUrl("/ts/autocomplete.do?method=autocomplete"),
				type:"post",
				dataType:"json",
				data:{
					autoId:"T25",
					condition1:$("#refTicketNoKeyword").val(),
					condition2:$("#ticketNo").val()
				},
				success:function(data) {
					response($.map(data, function(c) {
						//console.log(c);
						return {
							label:"(#" + c.ticketNo + ")" + restoreXSS(c.title),
							value:c.ticketNo,
							refTicketNo:c.ticketNoEnc,
							ticketTitle:c.title,
							bizUnitCd:c.bizUnitCd,
							reqTypeCd:c.reqTypeCd
						};
					}));
				},
				error:function(data) {
					alert("error occured.");
				}
			});
		},
		minLength:6,
		select:function(event, ui) {
			addReferenceTicket(ui.item.refTicketNo, ui.item.ticketTitle, ui.item.bizUnitCd, ui.item.reqTypeCd);
			return false;
		}
	});
	
	
	
	$("#btnBoIdPop").click(function() {
		if($("#boIdPopupLayer").length == 0) {
			$("<div id=\"boIdPopupLayer\" class=\"elm_pop_wrap1 popupLayer createdLayer\"></div>").appendTo("body").hide();

			var option = {
				layer:"boIdPopupLayer",
				element:{id:"btnBoIdPop", orientation:"right"},
				ajaxCall:true,
				url:getUrl("/ts/ticket.do?method=getMgrBoIdPopup&boId=&ticketNo=TS26501G&bizUnitCd=G3"),
				closeBtn:"closePopup",
				closeLayer:true
			};

			popupElementLayer(option);

			var top = $(this).offset().top - $("#boIdPopupLayer").height();
			if(top < 0) {
				top = 0;
			}
			$("#boIdPopupLayer").css("top", top + "px");

			$(".fixed_ticket_left").scroll(function() {
				$("#boIdPopupLayer").remove();
			});

			$(window).resize(function() {
				$("#boIdPopupLayer").remove();
			});
		} else {
			$("#boIdPopupLayer").remove();
		}
	});
	
	
	
	$(".modelCd_Autocomplete").autocomplete({
		minLength : 3,
		source : function(request, response) {
			$.ajax({
				url : getUrl("/ts/ticket.do?method=getTcomcrProductList&keyword=" + $(".modelCd_Autocomplete").val() + "&bizUnitCd=" + $("#bizUnitCd").val()),
				type : "post",
				dataType : "json",
				data: request,
				beforeSend : function() {
					blockUI();
				},
				complete : function() {
					unblockUI();
				},
				success : function(data) {
					var result = data.dataList;
					response(result);
				},
				error : function(data) {
					alert("error occured.");
				}
			});
		},
		select: function( event, ui ) {
			$(".modelCd_Autocomplete").val(ui.item.value);
			$("#modelCd").val(ui.item.value);
			setDispableModelPrinter();
			return false;
		}
	});

	$(document).on("click", ".comment_file", function(e) {
		e.preventDefault();

		var fileListBox = $(this).parent().parent().parent().find(".file_listBox");

		if(fileListBox.hasClass("none")) {
			fileListBox.removeClass("none");
		} else {
			fileListBox.addClass("none");
		}
	});

		e.preventDefault();

	$("#assignToMeBtn").click(function(e) {
		e.preventDefault();

		var setCheck = false;

		var bizStageCd = "L1";
		var agentGrpId = "AG1603070004";
		var userId = "UR-0358412";
		var chargerId = bizStageCd + ":" + agentGrpId + ":" + userId;

		var obj = $("input[name='bizStageCd0'][value='" + bizStageCd + "']").parent().parent().find("select > option[value='" + chargerId + "']");

		if(obj.length == 1) {
			obj.prop("selected", true);

			setCheck = true;
		}

		
			
				
			
				
					if(!setCheck) {
						bizStageCd = "L2";
						agentGrpId = "AG1601150006";
						userId = "UR-0358412";
						chargerId = bizStageCd + ":" + agentGrpId + ":" + userId;

						obj = $("input[name='bizStageCd0'][value='" + bizStageCd + "']").parent().parent().find("select > option[value='" + chargerId + "']");

						if(obj.length == 1) {
							obj.prop("selected", true);

							setCheck = true;
						}
					}
				
			
		
	});

	$("#viewBackBtn").click(function() {
		if($("#caller").val() == "VIEW") {
			location.href = '/b2t/ts/ticketView.do?method=page&caller=TICKETMODIFY&viewIndex=' + $("#callerArg").val();
		} else if($("#caller").val() == "SEARCH") {
			location.href = '/b2t/ts/ticketSearch.do?method=page&caller=TICKETMODIFY';
		} else if($("#caller").val() == "APPROVAL") {
			location.href = '/b2t/ts/ticket/ticketApproval.do?method=myApprovalListPage';
		} else if($("#caller").val() == "TASK") {
			location.href = '/b2t/ts/ticket/ticketTask.do?method=getMyTaskPage';
		} else if($("#caller").val() == "TOTAL_SEARCH") {
			location.href = '/b2t/ts/search.do?method=searchResult' + $("#callerArg").val();
		} else {
			window.history.back();
		}
	});

	$("#changeToActBtn").click(function(e) {
		e.preventDefault();

		if($(this).hasClass("on")) {
			$(this).removeClass("on");
			$(this).addClass("off");

			$("#changeToActBlock").hide();
		} else {
			$(this).removeClass("off");
			$(this).addClass("on");

			$("#changeToActBlock").show();
		}
	});

	$("#changeToInProgressActBtn").click(function(e) {

	$("#registerOnKedb").click(function(e) {
		//isKedbTicket 체크 후 이동
		checkedCanRegisterKedb();
		console.log("registerOnKedb checkedCanRegisterKedb ");
		var chkCanRegisterYn = $("#chkCanRegisterYn").val();
		console.log("registerOnKedb checkedCanRegisterKedb chkCanRegisterYn="+chkCanRegisterYn);
		if(chkCanRegisterYn.length == 1 && chkCanRegisterYn == 'Y'){
			//KEDB 등록 가능한 티켓번호인지 확인 후 이동 
			e.preventDefault();
			location.href = getUrl("/ts/contents/kedb.do?method=getKedbCreatePage") + "&ticketNo=" + $("#ticketNo").val();
		}else{
			openPopupMessage("Kedb has already been registered.", function(){
				reloadTicketModifyPage();
			}, true);
		}

	$("#descriptionBtn").click(function() {
		if($("#descriptionContent").is(":visible")) {
			$("#descriptionContent").hide();
			$("#descriptionContent").empty();
			$(this).parent().removeClass("on");
		} else {
			$("#descriptionContent").show();
			var descriptionWrap = $("#descriptionComment").wrap("<div></div>");
			$("#descriptionContent").html(descriptionWrap.parent().html());
			$("#descriptionContent").find("#descriptionComment").removeProp("id");
			descriptionWrap.unwrap();
			$(this).parent().addClass("on");
		}
	});

		a.focus();
	});

	$(".fixed_ticket_left").bind("contextmenu", function(e) { return false;});
	$(".fixed_ticket_left").bind('selectstart',function(e) {return false;}); 
	$(".fixed_ticket_left").bind('dragstart',function(e){return false;});
	
	var location_x = 0;
	var mouseup_check = false;
	
	$(document).mousedown(function(e){

		var start_x = e.clientX;

		if(e.which == 1){
			mouseup_check = true;
		}

		if(mouseup_check && e.which == 3){
			window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
		}
					
		if(start_x < 100){location_x = 1;}
		else if(start_x > 351) {location_x = 2;}
	});

	$(document).keydown(function(e){

		var browser = navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase();

		if(mouseup_check && (e.ctrlKey && e.keyCode == 67)){
			if((navigator.appName == 'Netscape' && -1 != navigator.userAgent.search('Trident')) || (-1 != browser.indexOf('msie'))){
			}else{
				window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
			}
		}	
	});
	
	$(document).mouseup(function(e){
		var end_x = e.clientX;
		var fieldFrame = $(".fixed_ticket_left");
		var xx = fieldFrame.offset().left;
		var lastxx = fieldFrame.width() + fieldFrame.offset().left;

		if(e.which == 1){
			mouseup_check = false;
		}
		
		if(location_x == 1 && end_x >= xx){
			window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
		}else if(location_x == 2 && end_x <= lastxx + 2){
			window.getSelection().removeAllRanges();
		}

		location_x = 0;
	});
	
	$("#closeProcess").change(function() {
		if($("#closeProcess").is(":checked")){
			$("#allowAct").val("");
			$("#closeProcessBlock").css('height', '30px');
			$("#ticketSubStatusCd").removeAttr("data-required");
			$("#resolutionBlock").hide();
			$("#commentBlock").show();
			
		} else {
			$("#closeProcessBlock").css('height', '20px');
			$("#ticketSubStatusCd").attr("data-required", "");
			$("#commentBlock").hide();
			$("#resolutionBlock").show();
		}
	});
	
});//$(document).ready(function() {

	//라디오 버튼 체크

			$("#assignToMeBtnBlock").show();
		
		
			$("#ownerResetBtnBlock").show();

		//var checkedValue = $("input[name='bizStageCd0']:checked").val();	
		offSearchCharger();
		initOwnnerList();

		
		
			
			
		

		
		
		
	});

	$("input[name='bizStageCd0']:checked").trigger("click");

	var emailDenySeqNo = "";
	if (emailDenySeqNo > 0) {
		//alert(emailDenySeqNo);
		$("#emailOn").hide();
		$("#emailOff").show();
		$("#isRefusalChk").val("on");
	}else{
		$("#emailOn").show();
		$("#emailOff").hide();
		$("#isRefusalChk").val("off");
	}

	});

}

function printSiteIdName(siteId, siteNm, siteAddr, contactNm, siteCountryCd, contactTelNo, contactEmailAddr, siteDesc) {
	$("#siteId").val(siteId);
	$("#siteNm").val(siteNm);
	$("#siteAddr").val(siteAddr);
	$("#contactNm").val(contactNm);
	$("#siteCountryCd").val(siteCountryCd);
	$("#contactTelNo").val(contactTelNo);
	$("#contactEmailAddr").val(contactEmailAddr);
	$("#siteDesc").val(siteDesc);
}

/**
 * 티켓 필드를 수정할 권한이 있는지 확인
 * - 각 사업부 수정 페이지에서 ready 맨 마지막에 호출할 것
 */
function checkTicketFieldAuth() {
	
		
		
		
		
			return true;
		
	
}

function checkTicketSpFieldAuth() {
	
		
		
		
			return false;
		
		
	
}
/**
 * 티켓 필드 수정 권한이 없는 경우 티켓 필드 disabled 처리함
 * - 각 사업부 수정 페이지에서 ready 맨 마지막에 호출할 것
 */
function initTicketFieldAuth() {
	if(!checkTicketFieldAuth()) {
		$(".ticketField").prop("disabled", true);
	}else if(!checkTicketSpFieldAuth()){
		$(".ticketSpField").prop("disabled", true);
	}	

}

/**
 * 티켓 변경 처리시에는 티켓 필드 데이터를 전송하기 위하여 Submit 직전에 티켓 필드를 활성화함
 */
function releaseTicketFieldAuth() {
	$(".ticketField").prop("disabled", false);
	$(".ticketSpField").prop("disabled", false);
}

function initOwnnerList() {

	
		
			
				$("#bizStageCd1").val("L1");
				$("#agentGrpId1").val("AG1603070004");
				$("#chargerId1").val("UR-0231069");
				
				var keyVal = "";
				var selectedOwner ="";
				keyVal = "#grpCharger1 option[value='L1:AG1603070004:UR-0231069']";
				$(keyVal).prop("selected", true);
				if($(keyVal).hasClass("sel_txtM")==true){
					$(keyVal).removeClass("sel_txtM").addClass("sel_txtMS");
				}else if($(keyVal).hasClass("sel_txtP")==true){
					$(keyVal).removeClass("sel_txtP").addClass("sel_txtPS");
				}
				if($(keyVal).hasClass("sel_txtQ")==false && $(keyVal).text().indexOf("**")< 0){
					selectedOwner = $(keyVal).text().trim() + " **";
					$(keyVal).text(selectedOwner);
				}
			
			
			
			
		
	
		
			
			
				$("#bizStageCd2").val("L2");
				$("#agentGrpId2").val("AG1601150006");
				$("#chargerId2").val("UR-0353714");

				var keyVal = "";
				var selectedOwner ="";
				keyVal = "#grpCharger2 option[value='L2:AG1601150006:UR-0353714']";
				$(keyVal).prop("selected", true);
				if($(keyVal).hasClass("sel_txtM")==true){
					$(keyVal).removeClass("sel_txtM").addClass("sel_txtMS");
				}else if($(keyVal).hasClass("sel_txtP")==true){
					$(keyVal).removeClass("sel_txtP").addClass("sel_txtPS");
				}
				if($(keyVal).hasClass("sel_txtQ")==false && $(keyVal).text().indexOf("**")< 0){
					selectedOwner = $(keyVal).text().trim() + " **"; 
					$(keyVal).text(selectedOwner);
				}
			
			
			
		
	

	$(".grpCharger").prop("disabled", true).addClass("disabled");

	
	
		
		
	

	
	
	if($("#grpCharger2 option:eq(0)").val() == "") {
		$("#grpCharger2").val("");
	}

	if($("#grpCharger3 option:eq(0)").val() == "") {
		$("#grpCharger3").val("");
	}

	if($("#grpCharger4 option:eq(0)").val() == "") {
		$("#grpCharger4").val("");
	}
}

function getAtchFileTotalSize(){
	var totalFileSize = 0;
	if ($("#mainForm input[name='attcFile']").length > 1) {
		var file = $("#mainForm input[name='attcFile']");
		for(var i=0; i<file.length; i++){
			if($(file[i]).val() == ""){
				continue;
			}
			var fileSize = file[i].files[0].size;
			totalFileSize += fileSize;
		}
	}
	return totalFileSize;
}


function checkedApprovalUserId(newChargerId1){
	
	var rslt = "N";
	$.ajax({
		type: 'POST',
		async : false,
		url: ctx + "/ts/ticket.do?method=checkedApprovalUserId",
		dataType : "json",
		data:{
			"ticketNo" :  $("#ticketNo").val()
			, "chargerId1" : newChargerId1
		},
		success: function(data){
			console.log("checkedApprovalUserId / result="+data.result);
			if(data.result== "Y"){
				$("#chkApprovalUserId").val(data.result);
				$("#newApprovalUserNm").val(data.newApprovalUserNm);
				$("#prevApprovalUserNm").val(data.prevApprovalUserNm);
			}
		},
		error: function(data, status, err){
			alert("An error occurred.");
		}
	});
}

function checkedCanRegisterKedb(){
	
	var rslt = "";
	$.ajax({
		type: 'POST',
		async : false,
		url:getUrl("/ts/contents/kedb.do?method=checkedCanRegisterKedb"),
		dataType : "json",
		data:{'ticketNo':$("#ticketNo").val()},
		success: function(data){
			console.log("checkedCanRegisterKedb result="+data.result);
			if(data.result== "Y"){
				rslt = "Y";
			}else{
				rslt = "N";
			}
			$("#chkCanRegisterYn").val(rslt);
		},
		error: function(data, status, err){
			alert("An error occurred.");
		}
	});
}

function checkedUploadSpace(){
	
	var atchFileTotalSize = getAtchFileTotalSize();
	var rslt = "N";
	$.ajax({
		type: 'POST',
		async : false,
		url: ctx + "/ts/ticket.do?method=checkedUploadSpace",
		dataType : "json",
		data:
		{
			"atchFileSize" : atchFileTotalSize
			, "ticketNo" :  $("#ticketNo").val()
		},
		success: function(data){
			console.log("checkedUploadSpace atchFileTotalSize="+atchFileTotalSize+"/ result="+data.result +"/ space="+data.space);
			if(data.result== "Y" || atchFileTotalSize == 0){
				rslt = "Y";
			}
			$("#chkUploadSpace").val(rslt);
		},
		error: function(data, status, err){
			alert("An error occurred.");
		}
	});
}

function viewSearchCharger(stage){
	$("#grpCharger"+stage).prop("disabled", false).removeClass("disabled");
	$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).show();
	$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).prop("disabled", false).removeClass("disabled");
	$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).attr("placeholder","Direct Search");
}

function validate() {
	
	checkedUploadSpace();
	
	// CR Tool 일 경우 상태 변경 여부 따라 validateSatisfy 체크가 달라진다. 
	$("input[name='ticketProcStatusCd']").val($("#ticketProcStatusCd").val());
	
	if($("#ticketProcStatusCd").val() != $("#ticketProcStatusCd00").val()) {
		$("#ticketProcStatusForce").val("Y");
	} else {
		$("#ticketProcStatusForce").val("N");
	}
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	var chkCafeNote= "Y";
	if($("#closeProcess").length > 0 && !$("#closeProcess").is(":checked")) {
		chkCafeNote = "N";
	}
	if(chkCafeNote != "N"){
		getCafeContent("mainForm", "commentContent", 2);
		trimSet("commentContent");
	}

	if($("button[name='commentType0']:eq(0)").hasClass("on")) {
		$("#commentType").val("01");  //Internal note
	} else {
		$("#commentType").val("02");  //Public note
	}
	if($("#commentContent").val() == "<p>&nbsp;</p>") {
		$("#commentContent").val("");
	} else if($("#commentContent").val() == "<br>") {
		$("#commentContent").val("");
	}
	
	if($("#ticketProcStatusForce").val() == "Y") {
		
		if(checkEmpty("commentContent", "put your comments to change status.")) {
			return false;
		}
	}
	

	
	if ($("#mainForm input[name='attcFile']").length > 1) {
		
		if(checkEmpty("commentContent", "put your comments to upload file.")) {
			return false;
		}
		
		
		var chkUploadSpaceVal = $("#chkUploadSpace").val();
		if(chkUploadSpaceVal != "Y") {
				var msg = 'Another user is trying to upload a large volume. Please upload again in a few minutes.';
				openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg, function() {
				}, true);
				//checkedUploadSpace 초기화
				$("#chkUploadSpace").val("");
				return false;
		}
	}
	

	
	if($("#commentContent").val() != ""){
		var str = $("#commentContent").val();
		var stringByteLength = str.replace(/[\0-\x7f]|([0-\u07ff]|(.))/g,"$&$1$2").replace(/[\'|(|)|&]/g,"-----").replace(/[<|>]/g,"----").length;
		if(stringByteLength>1000000){
			var msg = "Your comment exceeds the maximum length.<br/>If large images are inserted in the comment, please delect and upload files seperately.";
			openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg, function() {
			}, true);
			return false;
		}
	}
	
	
	if($("#closeProcess").length > 0 && !$("#closeProcess").is(":checked")) {
		$("input[name=attcFile]").MultiFile('reset');
	}
	
	
	
	

	var grpChargerId = $("input[name='bizStageCd0']:checked").parent().parent().find(".grpCharger").attr("id");
	
	var grpCharger1Val = $("#grpCharger1").val();
	var grpCharger2Val = $("#grpCharger2").val();
	var grpCharger3Val = $("#grpCharger3").val();

	if(checkEmpty(grpChargerId, 'Please specify person or group in charge.')) {
		return false;
	}
/* 	 */
	if(grpCharger1Val == "dirChar1" ){
		var msg = 'Please specify person or group in charge. L1 Owner ';
		openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg, function() {
		}, true);
		return false;
	}
	
	if(grpCharger2Val == "dirChar2" ){
		var msg = 'Please specify person or group in charge. L2 Owner ';
		openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg, function() {
		}, true);
		return false;
	}
	
	if(grpCharger3Val == "dirChar3" ){
		var msg = 'Please specify person or group in charge. L3 Owner ';
		openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg, function() {
		}, true);
		return false;
	}
	
	var chngChargerId1Yn = "N";
	var currentChargerId =  "UR-0231069";
	var grpCharger1 = grpCharger1Val.split(":");
	var newChargerId1 = grpCharger1[2];
	$("#bizStageCd1").val(grpCharger1[0]);
	$("#agentGrpId1").val(grpCharger1[1]);
	$("#chargerId1").val(newChargerId1);

	var grpCharger2 = grpCharger2Val.split(":");
	$("#bizStageCd2").val(grpCharger2[0]);
	$("#agentGrpId2").val(grpCharger2[1]);
	$("#chargerId2").val(grpCharger2[2]);

	var grpCharger3 = grpCharger3Val.split(":");
	$("#bizStageCd3").val(grpCharger3[0]);
	$("#agentGrpId3").val(grpCharger3[1]);
	$("#chargerId3").val(grpCharger3[2]);

	var grpCharger4 = $("#grpCharger4").val().split(":");
	$("#bizStageCd4").val(grpCharger4[0]);
	$("#agentGrpId4").val(grpCharger4[1]);
	$("#chargerId4").val(grpCharger4[2]);

	if($("input[name='bizStageCd0']:eq(0)").is(":checked")) {
		$("#bizStageCd").val(grpCharger1[0]);
		$("#agentGrpId").val(grpCharger1[1]);
		$("#chargerId").val(newChargerId1);
			if(newChargerId1 != currentChargerId ){
				chngChargerId1Yn = "Y";
			}
	} else if($("input[name='bizStageCd0']:eq(1)").is(":checked")) {
		$("#bizStageCd").val(grpCharger2[0]);
		$("#agentGrpId").val(grpCharger2[1]);
		$("#chargerId").val(grpCharger2[2]);
	} else if($("input[name='bizStageCd0']:eq(2)").is(":checked")) {
		$("#bizStageCd").val(grpCharger3[0]);
		$("#agentGrpId").val(grpCharger3[1]);
		$("#chargerId").val(grpCharger3[2]);
	} else if($("input[name='bizStageCd0']:eq(3)").is(":checked")) {
		$("#bizStageCd").val(grpCharger4[0]);
		$("#agentGrpId").val(grpCharger4[1]);
		$("#chargerId").val(grpCharger4[2]);
	}
	
	
	// harman bkwon81.kim remove start
	
	// harman bkwon81.kim remove end
	
	// harman bkwon81.kim add start
	if(!validateRelatedTicketNo3()){
		
		var msg = '';
		
		
		
		
		if($("#accountId").val()=="201405241024587378780000000001079504"){ //verizon
			//msg = 'Please enter a Remedy Ticket ID (00000001 ~ 99999999) or Internal Ticket ID (888888xx).';
			msg = 'Please enter one of the following values (888888xx).';
		}
		// H4SEC-298
		// Telus : Verizon Remedy IF 적용 전 로직 적용
		else if($("#accountId").val()=="202009242356177325120000000001049481"){ //Telus
			msg = 'Please enter a Remedy Ticket ID (00000001 ~ 99999999) or Internal Ticket ID (888888xx).';	
		}
		else{ //dish
			msg = 'Please enter one of the following values (888888xx).';
		}
		
		
		
		openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg,  function() {
			$("#relatedTicketNo").focus();
		});
		return false;
	}
	// harman bkwon81.kim add end	
	
	 
	
	
	
	/* hasTicketAuthCurrentOwnerL1 이고 L1 변경이 있을 경우 RR 신규 결재가 있는지 변경여부 알람.  */
	
		if(chngChargerId1Yn == "Y"){
			
			checkedApprovalUserId(newChargerId1);
		}
	
	
	/* FROG 리솔루션 리포트 제출 승인/거절하는 경우 구현할 것 */
	$("#receiverList0").empty();

	if($("input[name='receiver']:checked").length > 0) {
		if(checkEmpty("commentContent", "put your comments to specify receiver.")) {
			return false;
		}
	}

	$("input[name='receiver']:checked").each(function(index, item) {
		$("<input type='hidden' name='forceReceiverVOList[" + index + "].receiver' value='" + $(item).val() + "' />").appendTo("#receiverList0");
	});

	

	//	NWI - Biz Voc 사용 안함
	
		trimSet("siteNm");
		trimSet("siteAddr");
		trimSet("contactNm");
		trimSet("contactTelNo");
		trimSet("contactEmailAddr");
		if($("#siteAddr").val() != '' || $("#contactNm").val() != '' || $("#contactTelNo").val() != '' || $("#contactEmailAddr").val() != ''){
			if($("#siteNm").val() == ''){
				openPopupMessage(getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Company']), function() {$("#siteNm").focus();});
				return false;
			}
		}
	
	
	return true;
}

function isEmail(_str){
	return _str.search(/^\s*[\w\~\-\.]+\@[\w\~\-]+(\.[\w\~\-]+)+\s*$/g)>=0;
}

function delCCsUser(elmt) {
	//alert($(elmt).parent().html());
	$(elmt).parent().remove();
	setTicketCcVOListSeq();
}

function setTicketCcVOListSeq() {
	$("input[name^='ticketCcVOList'][name$='referId']").each(function(index) {
		//alert(index);
		$(this).attr("name", "ticketCcVOList[" + index + "].referId");
	});
	//alert($("#ccsUserNameArea").html());
}


function addReferenceTicket(refTicketNo, ticketTitle, bizUnitCd, reqTypeCd){
	$("#refTicketNoKeyword").val("");

	if ($("#referenceTicketList").find("input[name^='referenceVOList'][name$='refTicketNo'][value='" + refTicketNo + "']").length == 0) {
		var html = "";
		html += "<li>";
		html += "<span onclick=\"popupRelatedTicket('" + refTicketNo + "','"  + bizUnitCd + "','"  + reqTypeCd + "')\" title='(#" + refTicketNo + ")" + ticketTitle + "'>";
		html += "(#" + refTicketNo + ")" + ticketTitle + "</span>";
		html += "<a href='#' onclick='deleteTicketReference(this);'><img src='/b2t/images/btsp/common/btn_close.gif' alt=''></a>";
		html += "<input type='hidden' name='referenceVOList[].refTicketNo' value='" + refTicketNo + "' />";
		html += "</li>";
		$("#referenceTicketList").append(html);

		setTicketReferenceVOListSeq();

	} else {
		alert("Already exist");
	}

}

function deleteTicketReference(elmt){
	$(elmt).parent().remove();
	setTicketReferenceVOListSeq();
}

function setTicketReferenceVOListSeq() {
	$("input[name^='referenceVOList'][name$='refTicketNo']").each(function(index) {
		$(this).attr("name", "referenceVOList[" + index + "].refTicketNo");
	});
}

function refreshReferenceTicketList(list) {
	$("#referenceTicketList").empty();
	var len = list.length;
	for(var i = 0; i < len; i++){
		var obj = list[i];
		var html = "<li><span>(#" + obj.refTicketNo + ") " + obj.title + "</span>";
		html += "<a href=\"javascript:deleteTicketReference('" + obj.seqNo + "','" + obj.ticketNo + "','" + obj.refTicketNo + "')\">";
		html += "<img src=\"/b2t/images/btsp/common/btn_close.gif\" alt=\"delete\"></a>";
		$("#referenceTicketList").append(html);
	}
}

function popupRelatedTicket(ticketNo, bizUnitCd, reqTypeCd){
	if(bizUnitCd  == undefined || bizUnitCd  == ''){
		bizUnitCd = $("#bizUnitCd").val();
	}
	if(reqTypeCd  == undefined || reqTypeCd  == ''){
		reqTypeCd = $("#reqTypeCd").val();
	}
	var popupUrl = getTicketFormUrl("m", "m", "g", bizUnitCd, reqTypeCd);
	popupUrl += "&ticketNo=" + ticketNo;

	
//	var windowName = 'popupRelatedTicket' + ticketNo;
//	var w = window.open(popupUrl,windowName,'');
	var w = window.open(popupUrl, '_blank','');
	w.focus();
}


function goRndreqList() {
	
	if(navigator.userAgent.toLowerCase().indexOf("msie")!= -1 || navigator.userAgent.indexOf("rv:11.0") > -1){ // 브라우져가 IE인 경우
		//IE9
		var width = 1000;
		var height = 733;
	}else{
		//chrome
		var width = 1000;
		var height = 738;
	}
	var rndUrl = getRnDListUrl($("#bizUnitCd").val()) + "&ticketNo=" + $("#ticketNo").val();
	//nalert(rndUrl);
	var win = window.open(getUrl(rndUrl)+"&t=" + (new Date()).getTime(), 'RndreqList', 'scrollbars=yes,toolbar=no,resizable=no,width='+width+',height='+height+',left=100,top=100');
	win.focus();
	return;
}


function setDispableModelPrinter(){
	$(".modelPrinterForm").attr("disabled", true);
	$("#btnResetModelPrinter").attr("disabled", false);
	$("#btnResetModelPrinter").removeClass("disable");
	$("#btnResetModelPrinter").bind("click", function(){
		resetModelPrinter();
	});
}

function resetModelPrinter(){
	$(".modelPrinterForm").val("");
	$(".modelPrinterForm").attr("disabled", false);
	$("#modelCd").val("");
	$(".modelPrinterForm").eq(0).focus();
	$("#btnResetModelPrinter").unbind("click");
	$("#btnResetModelPrinter").attr("disabled", true);
	$("#btnResetModelPrinter").addClass("disable");
}


function openRndReqPrtView(rndReqId, sysType) {

	var method = "";
	if(sysType == "PLM") {
		method = "getRndReqModifyPrtPlmPage";
	} else {	// PQI
		method = "getRndReqModifyPrtPqiPage";
	}

	var rndUrl = "/ts/ticketPrt.do?method=" + method + "&rndReqId=" + rndReqId;
	var a = window.open(getUrl(rndUrl)+"&t=" + (new Date()).getTime(), 'RndreqList', 'scrollbars=yes,toolbar=no,resizable=no,width=1000,height=740,left=100,top=100');
	a.focus();
}

function goRndreqViewMblPlm(rndReqId){
	var rndUrl = "/ts/ticketMbl.do?method=getRndReqViewMblPlm&rndReqId=" + rndReqId +"&ticketNo=" + $("#ticketNo").val() + "&t=" + (new Date()).getTime();
	var a = window.open(getUrl(rndUrl)+"&t=" + (new Date()).getTime(), 'RndreqView', 'scrollbars=yes,toolbar=no,resizable=no,width=1000,height=740,left=100,top=100');
	a.focus();
}

function openRndReqNwView(rndReqId, sysCd, caller) {
	var rndUrl = "";
	var windowOpenYn = "Y"
	if(sysCd == "PLM"){
		rndUrl = "/ts/ticketRndNw.do?method=getRndReqViewNwPlm&rndReqId=" + rndReqId +"&ticketNo=" + $("#ticketNo").val() + "&t=" + (new Date()).getTime();
		if(caller == "btspIdView"){
			windowOpenYn = "N"
		}
	} else {
		rndUrl = "/ts/ticketRndNw.do?method=getRndReqModifyNwPage&rndReqId=" + rndReqId +"&ticketNo=" + $("#ticketNo").val();
	}
	
	if(windowOpenYn == "Y"){
		var a = window.open(getUrl(rndUrl), 'RndreqList', 'scrollbars=yes,toolbar=no,resizable=no,width=1000,height=740,left=100,top=100');
		a.focus();
	}
}

function addCc(referId, label) {
	if($("input[name^='ticketCcVOList'][name$='referId'][value='" + referId + "']").length == 0) {
		var html = "";
		html += "<li>";
		html += "<span>" + label + "</span><a href='#' onclick='delCCsUser(this);'><img src='/b2t/images/btsp/common/btn_close.gif' alt=''></a>";
		html += "<input type='hidden' name='ticketCcVOList[].referId' value='" + referId + "' />";
		html += "</li>";
		$("#ccsUserNameArea").append(html);
		setTicketCcVOListSeq();
	} else {
		//alert('Already exists.');
	}
}

			layer:"captChaDiv",
			modal:true,

}

function doSubmit() {

	
	
	
		doSubmitTicket("");
	
	

}

function doSubmitTicket(act) {
	$("#mgrAct").val(act);

	closeCapCha();
	releaseTicketFieldAuth();
	removeAttcFileElmt();
	
	/*
		
		//removeAttcFileElmtRsSummary();
		// getResolutionSummaryPage 를 import 하지 않으면 필요없다. rsAttcFile 가 있는 지확인.
		if ($("#resolutionSummary input[name='rsAttcFile']").length == 1) {
			$("#resolutionSummary input[name='rsAttcFile']").remove();
		}
	
	*/
	
	submitTicket();
}

function reloadTicketModifyPage() {
	location.href = getTicketFormUrl("m", "m", "p", $("#bizUnitCd").val(), $("#reqTypeCd").val()) + "&ticketNo=" + $("#ticketNo").val();
}

function checkSearhStr(){
	if($("#refTicketNoKeyword").val().trim().length>3){
		$("#infoMsg").empty();
	}else{
		$("#infoMsg").empty();
		$("#infoMsg").append("Please enter at least four letters");
	}
}

function modifyFail(){
	var message = "<p>Editing Mobile / VD / HA product related ticket is no longer</p>"
							+"<p>available here.</p>"
							+"<p>&nbsp;</p>"
							+"<p>Thanks. </p>";
	openPopupMessageSize('430','190',message, function(){
		reloadTicketModifyPage();
	});
	
}

function fileDelete(v_atchFileId, v_seqNo, v_fileSize, v_filePath, v_firstRegtId, v_idxCount) {
	openPopupMessageConfirm("Are you sure you want to delete?", function() {
		$.ajax({
			url : getUrl("/ts/ticket.do?method=deleteTicketCommentFile"),
			type : "post",
			dataType : "json",
			data: {"atchFileId" : v_atchFileId, "seqNo" : v_seqNo, "commentFirstRegtId" : v_firstRegtId, "filePath" : v_filePath
			},
			success : function(data) {
				$("#button_"+ v_atchFileId+v_seqNo).hide();
				$("."+v_atchFileId+v_seqNo).children('a').css({"pointer-events" : "none", "text-decoration" : "line-through"});
				$(".comment_file" + v_idxCount).html(parseInt($(".comment_file" + v_idxCount).html())-1);
				
				var file_size = parseInt($(".hidden_file_size" + v_idxCount).val())-parseInt(v_fileSize);
				var file_size_format = "";

				if(file_size < 1024) {
					file_size_format =  String(parseInt(file_size)) + " Bytes";
				} else if(file_size < 1024 * 1024) {
					file_size_format = String(parseInt(file_size / 1024)) + " KB";
				} else if(file_size < 1024 * 1024 * 1024) {
					file_size_format = String(parseInt(file_size / (1024 * 1024))) + " MB";
				} else {
					file_size_format = String(parseInt(file_size / (1024 * 1024 * 1024))) + " GB";
				}
				
				$(".hidden_file_size" + v_idxCount).val(file_size);
				$(".atch_file_size" + v_idxCount).html(file_size_format);
				
				var result = data.dataList;
				response(result);
			},
			error : function(data) {
				alert("error occured.");
			}
		});
	});
}


function deleteOneComment(v_commentId, v_ticketNo, v_firstRegtId, v_ticketStatusCd) {
	openPopupMessageConfirm("Are you sure you want to delete comment?", function() {
		$.ajax({
			url : getUrl("/ts/ticket.do?method=deleteTicketOneComment"),
			type : "post",
			dataType : "json",
			data: {"commentId" : v_commentId, "ticketNo" : v_ticketNo, "firstRegtId" : v_firstRegtId, "ticketStatusCd" : v_ticketStatusCd
			},
			success : function(data) {
				var result = data.result;
				if(result == "0") {
					openPopupMessage('Comment has been deleted.', function() {
						reloadTicketModifyPage();
					}, true);
				}else if(result == "1"){
					openPopupMessage('Permission denied.', function() {
					}, true);
				}
				
			},
			error : function(data) {
				alert("error occured.");
			}
		});
	});
}

	function changeGrpCharger(stage){
		var grpCharVal =  $("#grpCharger"+stage).val();
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).val("");
	
		if(grpCharVal == "dirChar"+stage){
			$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).focus();
		}else{
			$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).attr("placeholder","Direct Search");
		}
	}
	
	function offSearchCharger(){
		$("#dirSearchChar1").hide();
		$("#dirSearchChar2").hide();
		$("#dirSearchChar3").hide();
		$("#dirSearchChar1").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading" );
		$("#dirSearchChar2").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading" );
		$("#dirSearchChar3").removeClass( "ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading" );
		$("#dirSearchChar1").val("");
		$("#dirSearchChar2").val("");
		$("#dirSearchChar3").val("");
	}
	
	function dirSearchCharger(bizStageCd, value){
		if("40" != "60"){
			setQueueSearchData(bizStageCd, value, false);
		}
	}
	
	function hideQueueSearchData(stage, value){
		$("#grpCharger"+stage).prop("disabled", false);
		if(value == null || value == ""){
			$("#grpCharger"+stage+" option:eq(0)").prop("selected", true);
		}else{
			$("#grpCharger"+stage).val(value).prop("selected", true);
		}
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).hide();
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).prop("disabled", false);
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).attr("placeholder","Direct Search");
	}
	
	function showQueueSearchData(stage, value, isFocus, isBizStage){
		$("#grpCharger"+stage).prop("disabled", false).removeClass("disabled");
		if((isBizStage && value == "dirChar"+stage)|| value == null || value == ""){
			$("#grpCharger"+stage+" option:eq(1)").prop("selected", true); // 큐멤버가 일치 않을시 예외 처리.
		}else{
			$("#grpCharger"+stage).val(value).prop("selected", true);
		}
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).show();
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).prop("disabled", false).removeClass("disabled");
		if(isFocus){
			$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).focus();
		}else{
			$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).attr("placeholder","Direct Search"); //$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).hide();
		}
	}
	
	function selectQueueSearchData(stage, bizStageCd, agentGrpId, userId){
		var value = "";
		if(bizStageCd == null || agentGrpId == null || userId == null){
			return false;
		}else{
			$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).blur();
			$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).val("");
			value = bizStageCd +":"+agentGrpId +":"+userId;
			setQueueSearchData(stage, value, false);
		}
	}
	
	function setQueueSearchData(stage, value, isFocus){
		if(stage != null && "40" != "60"){
			var isBizStage = false;
			if(isNaN(stage) && stage.indexOf("L") > -1){
				isBizStage  = true;
				stage = stage.substr(1, stage.length);
			}
			var  isShow = false;
			if(stage == 1){
				
				isShow = true;
				
			}else if(stage == 2){
				
				isShow = true;
				
			}else if(stage == 3){
				
				isShow = true;
				
			}
			
			if(isShow){
				showQueueSearchData(stage, value, isFocus, isBizStage);
			}else{
				hideQueueSearchData(stage, value);
			}
		}
	}
	
	function msgSearchCharger(stage){
		openPopupMessage("User Name or E-mail Address is not exist", function(){
			afterSearchCharger(stage);
		}, true);
	}

	function afterSearchCharger(stage){
		$("#grpCharger"+stage).prop("disabled", false);
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).removeClass("ui-autocomplete-input ui-autocomplete-loading");
		$("#dirSearchChar"+stage).focus();
	}

	function copyURL(url){
		$('#clip_tmp').val(url);
		$("#clip_tmp").select();;
		var successful = document.execCommand('copy');
		if (successful) {
			openPopupMessage('Copied ticket url to clipboard.', function() {});
			console.log("copyURL : " + $('#clip_tmp').val());
		} else {
			openPopupMessage('Not copied ticket url to clipboard.', function() {});
			console.log("copyURL : " + $('#clip_tmp').val());
		}
	}
	
	<!-- cafeNote -->
	function onSubmitNamoEdit(editor){
		var bodyValue = getCafeNoteBodyValue("mainForm");
		editor.value = bodyValue;
		return true;
	}
	function onSetEdior(editor){
		var bodyValue = getCafeNoteBodyValue("mainForm");
		editor.value = bodyValue;
		return true;
	}
	function getCafeNoteBodyValue(formId) {
		var content = cafe.getContent("cafeDemo");
		$('#' + formId).find('div[id=cafeDataDom]').html(content);
		content = $("#cafe-note-contents").html();
		return content;
	}
	jQuery(document).ready( function() {
		jQuery.validator.addMethod("checkEdiorRequest", function(value, element) {
			return (onSubmitNamoEdit(element));
		}, "* Editor field is required.");
		jQuery.validator.addMethod("setEdior", function(value, element) {
			return (onSetEdior(element));
		}, "* ");
		try{
				$('#commentContent').rules("add", {checkEdiorRequest : true});
		}catch(e){
				$('#commentContent').closest('form').validate();
				$('#commentContent').rules("add", {checkEdiorRequest : true});
		}
	});
	<!-- cafeNote// -->
</script>
