<!-- p일경우 class="contents_p" -->
<!-- q일경우 class="contents_q" -->

<style>
	#popupMessagePrs .mes_wrap {height:60%; overflow-y:scroll; overflow-x:hidden;}	
	.progressCon { width:100%; height:20px; margin-bottom:5px; }	
	.fileNmDiv { width: 49%; float: left; overflow: hidden; word-break: break-all; white-space: nowrap; text-overflow: ellipsis; }	
	.progressDiv { width:49%; height:18px; float:right; border:1px solid #e9e9e9; border-radius: 5px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; }
	.progressBar { height:18px; border-radius: 5px; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; }
</style>

<script>
	$(document).ready(function() {
		//object-storage 파일 ui용
		$("#mainForm input[name='obsFile']").MultiFile({
			list:"#obsFileList",	//파일목록을 출력할 요소 지정가능
			accept:"xlsb|alz|apk|asf|avi|bin|bmp|csv|doc|docx|eml|flv|gif|gul|gz|hds|hwp|jpeg|jpg|mht|mka|mkv|mov|mp4|mpeg|mpg|msg|par|pca|pcap|pdf|pem|png|ppt|pptx|ps|psd|rar|rtf|swf|tar|tif|txt|url|wmf|wmv|xls|xlsx|zip|log|xml|pcapng|cap|dmp|5vw|trc0|trc1|enc|trc|fdc|syc|bfr|tr1|snoop|dxf|sfs|z01|z02|z03|z04|z05|z06|z07|z08|z09|z10|pub|ghs|iso|dll|dwg|rfa|dcm|raw|map|evtx|db3|mta|orig|gxr|egg|a00|a01|a02|a03|a04|a05|a06|a07|a08|a09|a10|a11|a12|a13|a14|a15|a16|a17|a18|a19|a20|z00|z11|z12|z13|z14|z15|z16|z17|z18|z19|z20|tgz|7z|prn|001|002|003|004|005|006|007|008|009|010|011|012|013|014|015|016|017|018|019|020|lz4|xcg",
			maxfile:10485760, //각 파일 최대 업로드 (10GB => 10485760 KB)
			maxsize:10485760, // 전체 파일 최대 업로드 (10GB => 10485760 KB)
			STRING:{toomuch: "file size has exceeded the limit",
							toobig: "file size has exceeded the limit"}
		});
		
	});
	
	/**
	* 작업순서
	* 1.PAR 발급(BackEnd for OCI SDK)
	* 2.MultiPart 생성(OCI RestAPI)
	* 3.SendPart 전송(OCI RestAPI)
	* 4.MultiPart 병합(OCI RestAPI)
	* 5.PAR 삭제(BackEnd for OCI SDK)
	*/
	
	var preFix = "TICKET"; // bucket 하위 업무단위별 폴더
	var parId = ""; 	// 업로드용 par을 삭제하려면 있어야한다..
	var fileAttCnt = 0; // 첨부한 파일 갯수
	var fileCnt = 0; 	// 처리한 파일 갯수
	var ociRestUrl = "https://{namespaceName}.objectstorage.{regionUri}.oci.customer-oci.com";
	var setChunkMb = 1; // MB 단위로 설정
	var stopFlag = false;			
	var mFileArr = new Array(); // upload 처리 파일
	var cMultiIdArr = new Array(); // multipart abort 처리 파일
	var expMsgCnt = 0;
	
	// object-storage 업로드 시작
	function obsUpload(){
		
		stopFlag = false;
		expMsgCnt = 0;
		mFileArr = [];
		cMultiIdArr = [];
		obsElReset(); // 지역변수 및 el 초기화
		
		var progressBarHtml = "";
		
		$("input[type=file][name='obsFile']").each(function(index){
			if($(this).val() != ""){ // 첨부한 파일이 있을때만 jquery.MultiFile을 사용하면 빈 type=file이 하나는 꼭 있다.
				fileAttCnt++;
				progressBarHtml += "<div class=\"progressCon\">"
				progressBarHtml += "	<div class=\"fileNmDiv\">"+this.files[0].name+"</div>";
				progressBarHtml += "	<div class=\"progressDiv\"><div id=\"progressDivId_"+index+"\" class=\"progressBar\">0%</div></div>";
				progressBarHtml += "</div>";
			}
		});
		
		/** 티켓 상세는 코멘트 없이 파일을 첨부할 경우 메세지를 출력해야 함. */
		getCafeContent("mainForm", "commentContent", 2);
		trimSet("commentContent");
		
		if($("#commentContent").val() == "<p>&nbsp;</p>") {
			$("#commentContent").val("");
		} else if($("#commentContent").val() == "<br>") {
			$("#commentContent").val("");
		}
		
		if(fileAttCnt > 0){
			
			if(checkEmpty("commentContent", "put your comments to upload file.")) {
				return;
			} else {
				
				openPopupProgressBar(progressBarHtml, function(){}, true);
				
				/** upload용 PAR 발급 */
				$.ajax({
		            url: getUrl("/ts/objectStorage.do?method=createInfo")
		            ,type: "POST"
		            ,data: {
		            	"preFix": preFix
		    		}
		            ,dataType: "json"
		            ,async: true
		            ,success: function (data) {
		            	//console.log(JSON.stringify(data));
		            	parId = encodeURIComponent(data.result.parId);
		            	setChunkMb = data.result.chunkMb;
		            	ociRestUrl = ociRestUrl.replace("{namespaceName}",data.result.namespaceName);
		            	ociRestUrl = ociRestUrl.replace("{regionUri}",data.result.regionUri);
		            	
		            	$("#popupMessagePrs #obsChunkTxt").html(setChunkMb);
		            	$("#popupMessagePrs #obsUptimeTxt").html(data.result.parExpMin);
		            	
		            	obsCreateMultiPart(ociRestUrl, data.result.parAccessUri, data.result.uuidPreFixNm);	            	
		            }
		            ,fail: function() {		            	
		            	//openPopupMessage("An error occurred.<br>"+error);
		                openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
		            }
		            ,error: function(request,status,error) {
		            	//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);    			
		    			//openPopupMessage("An error occurred.<br>"+error);
		            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
		    		}
		            ,complete: function() {
		            	
		            }
		        });
			}
		} else {
			doSubmit(); // 티켓 수정 함수
		}
	}
	
	/** obs multipart 정보 생성 */
	function obsCreateMultiPart(restUrl, accUri, uuidPreFixNm){		
		var urlPas = restUrl+accUri;
		
		$("input[type=file][name='obsFile']").each(function(index){
			
			if(stopFlag == true){ // Cancle 일때
				return false; // breaks	
			}
			
			if($(this).val() != ""){
				var cFileNm = cleanFileNmStr(this.files[0].name);				
				urlPas2 = urlPas + preFix + "/"+uuidPreFixNm+"/"+cFileNm;
								
				$.ajax({
	                url: urlPas2
	                ,type: "PUT"
	                ,headers: { 'opc-multipart': true }
	                ,dataType: "json"
	                ,async: true
	                ,success: function (data) {
	                	//console.log(JSON.stringify(data));
	                	cMultiIdArr[index] = new Array(encodeURIComponent(data.object), data.uploadId);
	                	obsSendData(restUrl, index, data.accessUri, uuidPreFixNm);
	                }
	                ,fail: function() {
	                	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	                }
	                ,error: function(request,status,error) {
	                	//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
	        			openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	        		}
	                ,complete: function() {
	                	
	                }
	            });
			}				
		});			
	}
	
	/** upload file 전송 */
	function obsSendData(restUrl, fileIndex, accUri, uuidPreFixNm){
		
		if(stopFlag == true){ // Cancle 일때
			return;	
		}
		
		var file = $("input[type=file][name='obsFile']").get(fileIndex).files[0];
		
		var cMultiIdx = fileIndex; // VO용 Array Index
		//console.log("fileIndex:"+fileIndex+" / cMultiIdx:" + cMultiIdx + " / file.name:"+file.name );		
		
		var urlPas = restUrl+accUri;
	        
        var chunkSize = 1024 * 1024 * setChunkMb; // 1024 * 1024 * 10 size of each chunk (10MB)
		let start = 0;
		
		var maxPartNum = Math.ceil(file.size/chunkSize); // file.size is byte 3G is 3221225472 byte
		var chunkBlobArr = new Array(maxPartNum);
		
		var arrIdx = 0;
		while (start < file.size) {
			chunkBlobArr[arrIdx] = file.slice(start, start + chunkSize);
			start += chunkSize;
			arrIdx++;
		}		
		
		/** chunk 처리 piece file 전송 */
		function obsSendPart(url, idx){
			
			if(stopFlag == true){ // Cancle 일때
				return;	
			}
			
			var partNum = idx + 1;
			var urlPas2 = url + partNum;
			
			$.ajax({
                url: urlPas2
                ,type: "PUT"
                ,contentType: false
                ,processData: false
                ,data: chunkBlobArr[idx]
                ,async: true
                ,success: function (data, xhrText, xhr) {
                	if(xhr.readyState == 4 && xhr.status == 200){
                		//console.log("partNum : [" + partNum + "] success!!");                		
                		//console.log("idx : [" + idx + "] / maxPartNum : [" + maxPartNum + "] / (idx+1) : [" + (idx+1) + "]");
                		
						var percent = Math.round((partNum/maxPartNum) * 100);
                		
                		progrssBarFill(fileIndex, percent);
                		
                		if(partNum < maxPartNum){
                			obsSendPart(url, (idx+1));
                		} else if(partNum == maxPartNum) {
                			var cFileNm = cleanFileNmStr(file.name);
                			mFileArr[cMultiIdx] = new Array(urlPas, uuidPreFixNm, cFileNm, file.size, (cMultiIdx+1));
                			//console.log("mFileArr["+cMultiIdx+"] " + "fileNm:"+cFileNm);
                			//obsMergeCheckFile();
                			obsElAppendCheckFile();
                		}
                	}
                }
                ,fail: function() {
                	if(parId != ""){    			
    	    			var expResult = obsParInfo(parId);
    	    			
    	    			if(expResult == false){
    	    				if(expMsgCnt == 0){		        					
    	    					alert("(Fail) File transfer validity time has expired. Please upload again.");
    	    				}
    	    				obsCancleAct();
    	    				expMsgCnt = 1;
    	    			} else {		        			
    	        			if(confirm("The file could not be sent.\nWould you like to resend again?")){
    	                    	obsSendPart(url, idx);
    	                    } else {
    	                    	alert("file transfer has been cancelled.");
    	                    }
    	    			}
        			}
                }
                ,error: function(request,status,error) {
                	console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
                	if(parId != ""){    			
    	    			var expResult = obsParInfo(parId);
    	    			
    	    			if(expResult == false){
    	    				if(expMsgCnt == 0){		        					
    	    					alert("(Error) File transfer validity time has expired. Please upload again.");
    	    				}
    	    				obsCancleAct();
    	    				expMsgCnt = 1;
    	    			} else {		        			
    	        			if(confirm("The file could not be sent.\nWould you like to resend again?")){
    	                    	obsSendPart(url, idx);
    	                    } else {
    	                    	alert("file transfer has been cancelled.");
    	                    }
    	    			}
        			}
        		}
                ,complete: function() {
                	
                }
            });
		}
		
		obsSendPart(urlPas, 0);
		
	}	
	
	/** 전송된 multipart 파일의 VO를 한번에 추가하기 위한 함수 */
	function obsElAppendCheckFile(){		
		var chkCnt = 0;
		var mFileArrTmp = []; // jQuery.MultiFile.min.js가 파일 중복 처리시 file의 el순서가 변경이 발생함. 임시로 저장할 기능이 필요.
		for(i=0;i<mFileArr.length;i++){
			if(Array.isArray(mFileArr[i])){
				mFileArrTmp[chkCnt] = mFileArr[i];
				chkCnt++;			
			}
		}
		
		if(fileAttCnt == chkCnt && chkCnt > 0){
			mFileArr = mFileArrTmp; // 재설정 
			for(j=0;j<mFileArr.length;j++){
				//console.log("mFileArr["+j+"] " + mFileArr[j]);
				obsElAppend(mFileArr[j][1],mFileArr[j][2],mFileArr[j][3],mFileArr[j][4]); // 병합이 완료면 hidden VO를 만든다..
			}			
			cleanProgress(); // 전송안내창 클리어
			$("input[type='file'][name='obsFile']").remove(); 	// file object를 지워서 was전송 데이터를 줄인다.
			doSubmit(); // 티켓 수정 함수
		}		
	}
	
	/** 전송된 multipart 파일을 한번에 병합처리하기 위한 함수 */
	function obsMergeCheckFile(){		
		var chkCnt = 0;
		for(i=0;i<mFileArr.length;i++){
			if(Array.isArray(mFileArr[i])){
				chkCnt++;			
			}
		}
		
		if(fileAttCnt == chkCnt && chkCnt > 0){
			for(j=0;j<mFileArr.length;j++){
				//console.log("mFileArr["+j+"] " + mFileArr[j]);
				obsMergePart(mFileArr[j][0],mFileArr[j][1],mFileArr[j][2],mFileArr[j][3],mFileArr[j][4]);					
			}
		}		
	}
	
	/** chunk 처리 piece file merge 요청 */
	function obsMergePart(url, uuidPreFixNm, fileNm, fileSize, fileIdx){
		$.ajax({
            url: url
            ,type: "POST"
            ,async: true
            ,success: function (response, xhrText, xhr) {
            	//console.log(JSON.stringify(data));
            	if(xhr.readyState == 4 && xhr.status == 200){                		
            		
            		fileCnt++;                		
            		//obsElAppend(uuidPreFixNm, fileNm, fileSize, fileIdx); // 병합이 완료면 hidden VO를 만든다..
            		
            		if(fileAttCnt == fileCnt){
            			obsDestroyInfo(parId,"S");
            		}            		
            	}
            }
            ,fail: function() {
            	//openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
            }
            ,error: function(request,status,error) {
            	//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
            	//openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
    		}
            ,complete: function() {
            	
            }
        });
	}
	
	/** upload 파일정보 dataset 생성 */
	function obsElAppend(uuidPreFixNm, fileNm, fileSize, fileIdx){
		//중복된 value가 있는지 체크하자
		var dupFlag = false;		
		$("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList'][name$='.preFix']").each(function(index){
			if($(this).val() == preFix 
				&& $("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList'][name$='.obsNo']").eq(index).val() == fileIdx
				&& $("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList'][name$='.filePath']").eq(index).val() == uuidPreFixNm
				&& $("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList'][name$='.fileNm']").eq(index).val() == fileNm
				&& $("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList'][name$='.fileSize']").eq(index).val() == fileSize){				
				dupFlag = true; // 중복값 발생
				return false;				
			}
		});
		
		if(dupFlag == true){
			return;
		} else {
			var elCnt = $("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList'][name$='.preFix']").length;
			
			$("#mainForm").append($("<input/>", {type: "hidden", name: "fileObsVOList["+elCnt+"].obsNo", value: fileIdx }));
			$("#mainForm").append($("<input/>", {type: "hidden", name: "fileObsVOList["+elCnt+"].preFix", value: preFix }));
			$("#mainForm").append($("<input/>", {type: "hidden", name: "fileObsVOList["+elCnt+"].filePath", value: uuidPreFixNm }));
			$("#mainForm").append($("<input/>", {type: "hidden", name: "fileObsVOList["+elCnt+"].fileNm", value: fileNm }));
			$("#mainForm").append($("<input/>", {type: "hidden", name: "fileObsVOList["+elCnt+"].fileSize", value: fileSize }));
		}
		
	}
	
	/** 파일전송 취소시 multipart 삭제 */ 
	function obsAbortMultipart(fileAttCnt, parId){
		
		var chkCnt = 0;
		var cMultiIdArrTmp = []; // jQuery.MultiFile.min.js가 파일 중복 처리시 file의 el순서가 변경이 발생함. 임시로 저장할 기능이 필요.
		for(i=0;i<cMultiIdArr.length;i++){
			if(Array.isArray(cMultiIdArr[i])){
				cMultiIdArrTmp[chkCnt] = cMultiIdArr[i];
				chkCnt++;
			}
		}

		if(fileAttCnt == chkCnt && chkCnt > 0){
			cMultiIdArr = cMultiIdArrTmp; // 재설정
		}
		
		var fileCnt = 0;
		
		for(i=0;i<cMultiIdArr.length;i++){
			$.ajax({
	            url: getUrl("/ts/objectStorage.do?method=abortMultipart")
	            ,type: "POST"
	            ,data:{"object": cMultiIdArr[i][0] , 
	            	"uploadId": cMultiIdArr[i][1]		                	
	            }
	            ,dataType: "json"
	            ,async: true
	            ,success: function (response, xhrText, xhr) {            	
	            	if(xhr.readyState == 4 && xhr.status == 200){                		
	            		fileCnt++;              		
	            		if(fileAttCnt == fileCnt){
	            			obsDestroyInfo(parId,"C");
	            		}
	            	}
	            }
	            ,fail: function() {
	            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	            }
	            ,error: function(request,status,error) {
	    			//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
	            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	    		}
	            ,complete: function() {
	            	mFileArr = [];
	        		cMultiIdArr = [];	            	
	            }
	        });
		}
	}
	
	/** upload 변수 초기화 */
	function obsElReset(){
		parId = "";
		fileAttCnt = 0;
		fileCnt = 0;
		mFileArr = [];
		cMultiIdArr = [];
		
		// el 삭제
		$("input[type='hidden'][name^='fileObsVOList']").remove();
	}
	
	/** upload PAR 삭제 */
	function obsDestroyInfo(parId, sFlag){
		$.ajax({
            url: getUrl("/ts/objectStorage.do?method=destroyInfo")
            ,type: "POST"
            ,dataType: "json"
            ,async: false        
            ,data: {parId: parId}
            ,success: function (data) {
            	//console.log(JSON.stringify(data));
            }
            ,fail: function() {
            	//openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
            }
            ,error: function(request,status,error) {
            	//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
            	//openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
    		}
            ,complete: function() {
            	if(sFlag == "S"){
            		
            	}
            }
        });
	}
	
	/** upload 진행상태 popup */
	function openPopupProgressBar(message, func){
		var html = "";
		html += "<div id=\"popupMessagePrs\" class=\"pop_inner_wrap no_tit\" style=\"width:400px; height:300px; display:none;\">";
		html += "	<a class=\"closePopup t_close\" onclick=\"javascript:obsCancleAct();\">close</a>";
		html += "	<p style=\"font-weight:bold;padding-bottom:2px;\">File upload progress <img src=\"/b2t/images/btsp/ajax-loader.gif\" alt=\"ajax-loading\" /></p>";
		html += "	<p style=\"font-size:13px;padding-bottom:2px;\">- Progress updates every <span id=\"obsChunkTxt\">0</span> MB uploaded.</p>";
		html += "	<p style=\"font-size:13px;padding-bottom:2px;\">- Maximum upload time: <span id=\"obsUptimeTxt\">0</span> minutes.</p>";
		html += "	<p style=\"font-size:13px;padding-left:6px;padding-bottom:2px;\">(If exceeded, split the file size into smaller parts and retry)</p>";
		html += "	<div class=\"mes_wrap\">";
		html += message;
		html += "	</div>";
		html += "</div>";
	
		$(html).appendTo("body");
	
		var option = {
			layer:"popupMessagePrs",
			modal:$("#mask").is(":hidden") ? true : false,
			closeBtn:"closePopup",
			func:func
		};
	
		popupCenterLayer(option);
	}
	
	/** progress 표시 */
	function progrssBarFill(idx, per){
		$("#progressDivId_"+idx).text(per+"%");
		$("#progressDivId_"+idx).css({"width":""+per+"%","background":"#e9e9e9"});
	}
	
	/** 파일전송 취소 메세지 */
	function obsCancle(){
		if(confirm("Do you want to cancel file transfer?")){
			obsCancleAct();
		}
	}

	/** 파일전송 취소 */
	function obsCancleAct(){	
		var tmpFileAttCnt = fileAttCnt; // 초기화 전 파일갯수
		var tmpParId = parId;
		stopFlag = true;
		cleanProgress(); // 전송안내창 클리어		
		obsAbortMultipart(tmpFileAttCnt, tmpParId); // multipart 삭제
		obsElReset(); // 전송용 전역변수 초기화
	}
	
	/** upload progress 초기화*/
	function cleanProgress(){
		$("#popupMessagePrs").remove();
		hideMask();
	}
	
	/** 파일전송 취소 - cleanProgressN 사용 */
	function obsCancleActN(){	
		var tmpFileAttCnt = fileAttCnt; // 초기화 전 파일갯수
		var tmpParId = parId;
		stopFlag = true;
		cleanProgressN(); // 전송안내창 클리어		
		obsAbortMultipart(tmpFileAttCnt, tmpParId); // multipart 삭제
		obsElReset(); // 전송용 전역변수 초기화
	}
	
	/** upload progress 초기화 - hideMask 실행 안함 */
	function cleanProgressN(){
		$("#popupMessagePrs").remove();
	}

	/** upload PAR 유효여부 조회 */
	function obsParInfo(parId){				
		var expResult = false;
		$.ajax({
	        url: getUrl("/ts/objectStorage.do?method=getParInfo")
	        ,type: "POST"
	        ,dataType: "json"
	        ,async: false        
	        ,data: {parId: parId}
	        ,success: function (data) {
	        	console.log("obsParInfo success : "+JSON.stringify(data));
	    		if(data.code == "0"){
	    			expResult = true;
	    		} 	            	
	        }
	        ,fail: function() {
	        	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	        }
	        ,error: function(request,status,error) {
				console.log("obsParInfo code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
	        	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");			
			}
	        ,complete: function() {
	        	
	        }
	    });
		
		return expResult;
	}
	
	/** obs 다운로드 */
	function downloadObs(seqId, obsFileId, obsNo){
		
		var locParId = "";
		
		$.ajax({
            url: getUrl("/ts/objectStorage.do?method=downloadInfo")
            ,type: "POST"
            ,dataType: "json"
            ,data:{
            	seqId: seqId
            	,obsFileId: obsFileId
            	,obsNo: obsNo
            	,preFix: preFix 
            }
            ,async: false
            ,success: function (data) {
            	//console.log(JSON.stringify(data));
            	locParId = encodeURIComponent(data.result.parId);
            	ociRestUrl = ociRestUrl.replace("{namespaceName}",data.result.namespaceName);
            	ociRestUrl = ociRestUrl.replace("{regionUri}",data.result.regionUri);            	
            	dwFormSbt(ociRestUrl, data.result.parAccessUri, locParId, data.result.parSmtExpSec);
            }
            ,fail: function() {
            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
            }
            ,error: function(request,status,error) {
            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
    			//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
    		}
            ,complete: function() {            	
            	
            }
        });
		
		/** download 전송 */
		function dwFormSbt(ociRestUrl, parAccessUri, locParId, TimeoutSec){					
			$form = $("<form id=\"downloadObs\" action=\""+ociRestUrl+parAccessUri+"\" target=\"obsDwHiddenFrame\"></form>");
			$("body").append($form);
			
			$("#downloadObs").submit();
			$("#downloadObs").remove();
			
			setTimeout(function(){
				dwDestroyInfo(locParId);
			}, (TimeoutSec*1000));
		}
		
		/** download PAR삭제 */
		function dwDestroyInfo(parId){
			$.ajax({
	            url: getUrl("/ts/objectStorage.do?method=destroyInfo")
	            ,type: "POST"
	            ,dataType: "json"
	            ,async: false        
	            ,data: {parId: parId}
	            ,success: function (data) {
	            	//console.log(JSON.stringify(data));        		
	        		// alert("File upload is done.");        		
	            }
	            ,fail: function() {
	            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	            }
	            ,error: function(request,status,error) {
	    			//console.log("code:"+request.status+"\n"+"message:"+request.responseText+"\n"+"error:"+error);
	            	openPopupMessage("An error occurred.");
	    		}
	            ,complete: function() {
	            	
	            }
	        });
		}
	}
	
	/** 파일명의 공백을 치환 */
	function cleanFileNmStr(fileNm){
		var newStr = "";
		
		if(fileNm.trim() != ""){
			tmpFileNm = fileNm.trim();
			tmpFileNm = tmpFileNm.replace(/\s/g, "_");
			tmpFileNm = tmpFileNm.replaceAll("#", "_");
			newStr = tmpFileNm.replaceAll("%", "_");
		}
		
		return newStr;
	}
	
	function fileDownload() {
		var txt = "It hasn't been few minutes  since the file was uploaded, so it can't be downloaded. Try again in 10 minutes.";
		alert(txt);
		return;
	}
</script>

				<script type="text/javascript">
					cafe.create("cafeDemo", "/b2t/cafe/note/config.json", "GET", function() {
						cafe.setContent("cafeDemo", $('textarea[name="commentContent"]').val());
						cafe.setHeight("cafeDemo", 254);
					});
					/*
					1. To get the whole of HTML
					2. To get the HTML of main content
					3. To get the TEXT of main content
					*/
					function getCafeContent(formId, formData, getType) {
						if (getType == 1) {
							var content = cafe.getContent("cafeDemo");
							$('#' + formId).find('textarea[name='+formData+']').val(content);
						} else if(getType == 2) {
							var content = cafe.getContent("cafeDemo");
							$('#' + formId).find('div[id=cafeDataDom]').html(content);
							$('#' + formId).find('textarea[name='+formData+']').val($("#cafe-note-contents").html());
						} else if(getType == 3) {
							var content = cafe.getContent("cafeDemo", {"format" :"text"});
							$('#' + formId).find('textarea[name='+formData+']').val(content);
						}
					}
				</script>

									<div class="comm_txt">
										<p>Dear Team,</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;As discussed earlier, the observations from the pcap and logs it is evident that, BFDM is unable to process the BFDM control packets within control detect timer which is causing timer to be expired and initiating the control detect timer expiry packets towards peer side. Hence bfd flaps are observed.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>From logs it is observed that VOMA CPU load was getting spiked around the issue duration, we are suspecting the spike in VOMA CPU load causing the delay in processing the bfdm packets. Currently nodes on which BFDM issue observed were running from past 400+ days and as BFD is very time sensitive any delay in processing will result in flaps.<br><br></p><p>As part of 25BPKG, already process management optimizations are handled, with these BFDM flaps are expected to be resolved. Moreover, along with it in 26B BFDM code optimizations are planned for efficient packet processing.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Regards,<br>Rahul</p>

									<div class="comm_txt">
										<p>Dear Team,</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>As per the observations from the pcap and logs it is evident that, BFDM is unable to process the BFDM control packets within control detect timer</p><p>which is causing timer to be expired and initiating the control detect timer expiry packets towards peer side. Hence bfd flaps are observed.</p><p>From logs it is observed that VOMA CPU load was getting spiked around the issue duration, we are suspecting the spike in VOMA CPU load causing the delay in processing the bfdm packets.</p><p>currently nodes on which BFDM issue observed were running from past 400+ days and as BFD is very time sensitive any delay in processing will result in flaps.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>as part of 25BPKG, already process management optimizations are handled, with these BFDM flaps are expected to be resolved.</p><p>Moreover, along with it in 26B BFDM code optimizations are planned for efficient packet processing.<br></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p>
									</div>

										<p><span style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">Dear Team,</span></p><p><span style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">As per your requirement, we have collected the requested logs from mh3a2hph07vfgwu01sm between 00:11hrs to 00:18hrs.&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: bold; font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">Note :</span></p><p><span style="font-weight: bold; background-color: rgb(0, 255, 255); font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">1) Logs were started by me around 00:11hrs and stopped around 00:18hrs. font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt; background-color: rgb(255, 153, 0);">BTSP-Link :&nbsp;</span></p><p><span style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt;">https://btsp.samsunggsbn.com/b2t/ts/contents/community/community.do?method=getPostDetailPage&amp;viewMode=D&amp;postNo=16947</span></p><p><span style="font-family: Arial; <script>
	$(document).ready(function(){

		//changeCaptcha();

		//'확인' 버튼 클릭시
		$('#frmSubmit').click(function(){
			var callback = function(json){
				var toDo = json.rstCaptCha.replace(/\"/gi,"");
				
				if(toDo == "doSubmit"){
					openProgressLoadingBar(function() {
						eval("obsUpload()");
					});
				} else {
					eval(toDo+"()");
				}
			};
			chkCaptCha(callback);
		});

		
		$("#answer").keypress(
			function(event){
		    	if (event.keyCode == 13) {
					var callback = function(json){
						var toDo = json.rstCaptCha.replace(/\"/gi,"");
						
						if(toDo == "doSubmit"){
							openProgressLoadingBar(function() {
								eval("obsUpload()");
							});
						} else {
							eval(toDo+"()");
						}
					};
					chkCaptCha(callback);
				} 
	   		}
		);
		$("#closeCapBtn, #canCaptCha").click(function(){
			closeCapCha();
			$("#answer").val("");
		});
	});

	function changeCaptcha() {
		$("#frmSubmit").attr("disabled", true);
		$("#answer").attr("disabled", true);

		$('#catpcha').html('<img src="/b2t/images/common/loading_screen.gif"/>');
		
		var url = getUrl("/ts/captCha/captCha.do?method=getImg");
		$('#catpcha').html('<img src="'+ url +'&rand=' + Math.random()+ '"/>');

		$("#frmSubmit").attr("disabled", false);
		$("#answer").attr("disabled", false);
	}


	function chkCaptCha(callback){
		if (isEmpty($('#answer').val())) {
				openPopupMessage('Fail. Try again.', function() {
					changeCaptcha();
				});
		} else {
			$.ajax({
				url : getUrl("/ts/captCha/captCha.do?method=chkCaptCha"),
				type : 'POST',
				dataType : 'json',
				data : 'answer=' + $('#answer').val(),
				async : false,
				success : function(resp) {
					callback(resp);
					$('#answer').val('');
				}
			});
		}
	}

	function doFail(){
		openPopupMessage('Fail. Try again.', function() {
			changeCaptcha();
		});
	}
	
	function doFailTimeOut(){
		openPopupMessage('Capcha Time out. Try again', function() {
			changeCaptcha();
		});
	}


	function closeCapCha(){
		$("#captChaDiv").hide();
		hideMask();
		if($("#popupMessage").length > 0) {
			closePopupMessage();
		}
	}
</script>

	</h1>
	<div class="CaptchaBox">
		Please enter the number below.
		<div class="cap_imgBox">

					</a>
				</li>
			</ul>
		</div>
		<input class="cap_input" id="answer" type="text"></input>
	</div>

function modifyTicket() {
	
	
	if(!validate() || !validateNwsModify() || !validateNwsAlarmTicket()) {
		return;
	}
	
	if( "20260502121013" >= "20220615000000" && "G3"=="G3" && ("01"=="01" || "01"=="02") && ($("#accountId").val()=="201307310511060738250000000000083321" || $("#accountId").val()=="201405241024587378780000000001079504" || $("#accountId").val()=="202206270901000000000000000001050001") && $("#gaCd").val() == "" ) {
		alert("Please select GA/Pre-GA information.");
		$("#gaCd").focus();
		return;
	}
	
	
	var chkApprovalUserIdVal = $("#chkApprovalUserId").val();
	var newApprovalUserNmVal = $("#newApprovalUserNm").val();
	var prevApprovalUserNmVal = $("#prevApprovalUserNm").val();
	var args =  "from "+prevApprovalUserNmVal+" to "+newApprovalUserNmVal;
	if(chkApprovalUserIdVal == "Y") {
		var msg = getMessage('Do you want to change the ticket approver {0} as well ?', args);
		openPopupMessageUserDefineBtn(msg
			,'Yes'
			,'No' 
			, function() {
				$("#chkApprovalUserIdVal").val("");
				$("#newApprovalUserNm").val("");
				$("#prevApprovalUserNm").val("");
				$("#chngApprovalYn").val("Y");
				modifyTicketSubmit();
			}, function() {
				$("#chkApprovalUserIdVal").val("");
				$("#newApprovalUserNm").val("");
				$("#prevApprovalUserNm").val("");
				$("#chngApprovalYn").val("N");
				modifyTicketSubmit();
			}, "185"
		);
	} else {
		modifyTicketSubmit();
	}
}

function modifyTicketSubmit() {
	if($("#commentType").val() === "02" && $("#commentContent").val() != ""){ 
		goCaptCha();
	} else {
		openProgressLoadingBar(function() {
			obsUpload();
		});
		//doSubmit();
	}
}

function showDateFormatGuide(targetId){
	if($("#dateformatPlaceholder").length == 0) {
		var guideCss = {
			'border':'2px solid #97a9c1',
			'display':'none',
			'z-index':'29',
			'position':'relative',
			'background':'#e1eaf6',
			'width':'232px',
			'font-size':'11px',
			'padding' : '1px'
		};
	
	
		var guideLayer = $("<div id=\"dateformatPlaceholder\" class=\"popupLayer createdLayer\">※ Date Format : YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm</div>");
		guideLayer.css(guideCss);
		
		guideLayer.appendTo("body").hide();
	}
	 var option = {
		layer: "dateformatPlaceholder",
		element:{id: targetId, orientation:"bottom"},
		closeBtn: ""
	};

	popupElementLayer(option);
	
	$(".fixed_ticket_left").scroll(function() {
		$("#dateformatPlaceholder").hide();
	});
}

function isValidDttm(value){
	var pattern = /^(20\d{2})-(0[0-9]|1[0-2])-(0[1-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-1])\s([0-1][0-9]|2[0-3]):([0-5][0-9])$/;
	return pattern.test(value);   
}

function validateNwsAlarmTicket(){
	var result = true;
	
	return result;
}

<form id="rsltnSumNw" name="rsltnSumNw"></form>
<script>
	var RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS = "resetableCtgry";
	var selectMenuUseYn = "N";
	
	var reqTypeMsgArgNws = 'Request Type';
	function autocompletRequester(){
		$("#reqesterKeyword").autocomplete({
			source : function(request, response) {
				$.ajax({
					url		: getUrl("/ts/autocomplete.do?method=autocompleteAccount"),
					type		: 'post',
					dataType 	: 'json',
					data : {
						  "autoId"		: "T7"
						 , "condition1":"SWHQ"
						 , "condition2":$("#reqesterKeyword").val()
						 , "condition3":  '0AILQJ3MYo7e3L33Rw6HmQTAOGEETAOGEE'
						 , "condition4":$("#reqTypeCdTxt").val()
					},
					success : function(data) {
						response($.map(data, function (c) {
							var reqTypeCdTxt =  $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val();
							if( reqTypeCdTxt.length < 1) {
								openPopupMessage('Please enter '+reqTypeMsgArgNws+' information.', function() {
									//console.log("reqesterKeyword autocompletRequester validateReqTypeCd 2 ");	
									$("#reqesterKeyword").val("");
								}, true);
								return;
							}

							var text = c.accountNm;
							var phoneNo = "";
							if(c.userNm != null && c.userNm.length > 0){
								//text = text + "-" + c.userNm + "(" + c.emailAddr + ")";
								text = c.userNm + "(" + c.singleId + ")";
								phoneNo = c.telNo2 + "-" + c.telNo;
							}
							return {
								label : text,
								value: c.userNm,
								requesterNm :  c.userNm,
								requesterId :  c.userId,
								accountId : c.accountId,
								accountNm : restoreXSS(c.accountNm),
								emailAddr : c.emailAddr,
								singleId : c.singleId,
								phoneNo : phoneNo,
								countryCd : c.countryCd,
								secorgId : c.secorgId
							};
						}));
					},
					error : function(data) {
						openPopupMessage('Error :<br/>',  function() { });
					}
				});
			},
			minLength: 1,
			select: function( event, ui ) {
				$("#alreadyItsMe").val("");
				displayRequesterInfo(ui.item.requesterId, ui.item.requesterNm, ui.item.emailAddr, ui.item.singleId, ui.item.secorgId, ui.item.countryCd, ui.item.phoneNo, ui.item.accountNm, ui.item.accountId);
				setDisableRequesterNwS();
			}
		}).click(function(){
			var reqTypeCdTxt =  $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val();
			//if($("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == "" ) {
			if( reqTypeCdTxt.length < 1) {
				openPopupMessage('Please enter '+reqTypeMsgArgNws+' information.', function() {
					//console.log("reqesterKeyword autocompletRequester validateReqTypeCd 1 ");	
					$("#reqesterKeyword").val("");
				}, true);
				return;
			}
			$(this).autocomplete("search");
	});
	}
	
	function resetRequesterNwS(){
		$(".requesterForm").val("");
		$(".requesterForm").attr("readonly", false);
		$("#requesterInfo :input").each(function(){
			$(this).val("");
		});
		$(".requesterForm").eq(0).focus();
		$(".requesterForm").removeClass("disabled");
		
		$("#btnResetRequesterNws").hide();
		$("#alreadyItsMe").val("");
		resetAccountForm();
		resetAccountInfo($("#accountId"));
	}

	function setDisableRequesterNwS(){
		$(".requesterForm").attr("readonly", true);
		$(".requesterForm").addClass("disabled");
		$("#btnResetRequesterNws").show();
	}
	
	function setDisableAccountNwS(){
		$("#reqesterKeyword").val("");
		$(".requesterForm").attr("readonly", true);
		$(".requesterForm").addClass("disabled");
		$("#btnResetAccount").show();
	}

	function validateNwS() {
		var ret = true;
		
		if(checkEmpty("reqestorId", getMessage('{0} is required', ['Requester']))){
			$("#reqesterKeyword").focus();
			$("#reqesterKeyword").autocomplete("search");
			return false;
		}
		$("#mainForm :input[data-required]").each(function(){
			var invisible = $(this).data("invisible");
			if(invisible != "true"){
				var objId = $(this).attr("id");
				var fieldNm = $(this).attr("title")  + " ";
	
				var msg = '{0} is required';
				msg = getMessage(msg, [fieldNm]);
	
				if(checkEmpty(objId, msg)) {
					ret = false;
					if($(this).prop("tagName") == "SELECT"){
						//$(this).selectmenu("open");
					}
					return false;
				}
			}
		});
		
		var slaCheckPointDuplication = $("#slaCheckPointDuplication").val();
		var hasMadeDicision = (slaCheckPointDuplication == 'Y' || slaCheckPointDuplication == 'N');
		if(ret && !hasMadeDicision){
			var haveToCheckSLA = checkSLACheckPointDuplication();
			if(haveToCheckSLA){
				openPopupMessageConfirm("Are you going to use the same SLA check point?",
						function(){
							$("#slaCheckPointDuplication").val("Y");
							createTicket();
						},
						function(){
							$("#slaCheckPointDuplication").val("N");
							createTicket();
						}
				);
				ret = false;
				return false;
			}//if(haveToCheckSLA){
		}//if(ret && hasMadeDicision){
		
		return ret;
	}
		
	function validateNotiDt(reqTypeCd) {
		if(reqTypeCd == "01" || reqTypeCd == "02") {
			var notiDate = new Date($("#notiDt").datepicker("getDate"));
			var occurDate = new Date($("#occurDt").datepicker("getDate"));
			var notiDtMonth, notiDtDate, occurDtMonth, occurDtDate;
			
			if((notiDate.getMonth() + 1) < 10) {
				notiDtMonth = "0" + (notiDate.getMonth() + 1);
			} else {
				notiDtMonth = (notiDate.getMonth() + 1);
			}
			
			if((notiDate.getDate() + 1) < 10) {
				notiDtDate = "0" + (notiDate.getDate() + 1);
			} else {
				notiDtDate = (notiDate.getDate() + 1);
			}

			if((occurDate.getMonth() + 1) < 10) {
				occurDtMonth = "0" + (occurDate.getMonth() + 1);
			} else {
				occurDtMonth = (occurDate.getMonth() + 1);
			}

			if((occurDate.getDate() + 1) < 10) {
				occurDtDate = "0" + (occurDate.getDate() + 1);
			} else {
				occurDtDate = (occurDate.getDate() + 1);
			}
			
			var notiDt = notiDate.getFullYear() + "" + notiDtMonth + "" + notiDtDate;
			var occurDt = occurDate.getFullYear() + "" + occurDtMonth + "" + occurDtDate;
			
			if(notiDt < occurDt) {
				openPopupMessage180('The date of "Notification Date from Operator" must be later than the date of "Occurence Date"',  function() {        
				}, true);

				return false;
			}
		}
		return true;
	}
	
	function checkSLACheckPointDuplication(){
		var ret = false;
		$.ajax({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=checkSLACheckPointDuplication"),
			dataType:"json",
			data:{
				secorgId:$("#secorgId").val(),
				bizUnitCd:$("#bizUnitCd").val(),
				accountId:$("#accountId").val(),
				reqTypeCd:$("#reqTypeCd").val(),
				priorityCd:$("#priorityCd").val(),
				ticketNo:$("#ticketNo").val(),
				followupTicketNo:$("#followupTicketNo").val(),
				followupYn:$("#followupYn").val()
			},
			cache:false,
			contentType:"application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8",
			beforeSend:function() {
			},
			complete:function() {
			},
			success:function(json) {
				var result = json.result;
				var message = json.message;
				if(result == "0") {
					ret = true;
				}
			},
			error:function(request, status, error) {

			}
		});
		
		return ret;
	}

	function validateNwsModify() {

		if(!checkTicketFieldAuth()) {
			return true;
		}

		var ret = true;
		$("#mainForm :input[data-required]:enabled").each(function(){
			var invisible = $(this).data("invisible");
			if(invisible != "true"){	
				var objId = $(this).attr("id");
				var fieldNm = $(this).attr("title") + " ";
				var msg = '{0} is required';
				msg = getMessage(msg, [fieldNm]);
				if(checkEmpty(objId, msg)) {
					ret = false;
					openItemPanel(objId);
					return false;
				}
			}
		});
		return ret;
	}		

	function getCategoryListByAccount(obj, classIdx, defVal){
		var baseClassNm = RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + classIdx;
		var exemptionClassNm = RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + 0;
		$("[class^=" + RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + "]").each(function(){
			var classNm = getClassNm(this, RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS);
			if(exemptionClassNm != classNm && baseClassNm < classNm){
				resetSelectBox($(this));
			 }
		});
		
		if(!($(obj).val() == null || $(obj).val() == "")){
			var nextIdx = parseInt(classIdx) + 1;
			var $nextObj = $("." + RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + nextIdx);

			if($nextObj.length != 0){
				var url = "/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=getAccountCategoryList";
				var param = getCategoryParam(classIdx);

				var callback = function(json){
					var categoryList = json.categoryList;
					for(i in categoryList){
						
						if(categoryList[i].categoryCd == defVal){
							selected = "selected";
						}else{
							selected = "";
						}
						$nextObj .append("<option value='" + categoryList[i].categoryCd +"'"+ selected +">" + categoryList[i].categoryNm + "</option>");
					}
					refreshSelect($nextObj);
					
					if(categoryList.length == 1){
						$nextObj.val( categoryList[0].categoryCd);
						refreshSelect($nextObj);
						
						getCategoryListByAccount($nextObj, nextIdx);
					}
				};
				getCodeList(url, param, callback);
			}
		}
	}

	function getPriorityListByAccount(){
		var $target = $("#priorityCd");
		resetSelectBox($target);

		var reqTypeCd = $("#reqTypeCd").val();
		var secorgId = $("#secorgId").val();

		if($("#accountId").val() != ""){
			var url = "/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=getAccountPriorityList";
			var param = {
				"accountId" : $("#accountId").val()
			};
			var callback = function(json){
				var priorityList = json.priorityList;
				for(i in priorityList){
					if(secorgId == "SEUK" && reqTypeCd !="07"){
						if(priorityList[i].priorityNm != 'Q'){
							$target.append("<option value='" + priorityList[i].priorityCd +"'>" + priorityList[i].priorityNm + "</option>");
						} /*SEUK Priority 예외처리*/
					}else{
						$target.append("<option value='" + priorityList[i].priorityCd +"'>" + priorityList[i].priorityNm + "</option>");
					}
				}
				refreshSelect($target);
			};
			getCodeList(url, param, callback);
		}
	}
	
	function getSwVerListByAccount(){	
		var $target = $("#softwareVer");
		resetSelectBox($target);
		
		if($("#accountId").val() != ""){
			var url = "/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=getAccountSwVerList";
			var param = {
				"accountId" : $("#accountId").val()
			};
			var callback = function(json){
				var swVerList = json.swVerList;
				for(i in swVerList){
					$target.append("<option value='" + swVerList[i].softwareVerNm +"'>" + swVerList[i].softwareVerNm + "</option>");
				}
				refreshSelect($target);	
			};
			getCodeList(url, param, callback);
		}
	}

	function getSubReqTypeListByAccount(){
		var $target = $("#subReqTypeCd");
		resetSelectBox($target);

		var url = "/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=getAccountSubReqTypeList";
		var param = {
			"accountId" : $("#accountId").val()
			,"reqTypeCd" : $("#reqTypeCd").val()
		};
		var callback = function(json){
			var subReqTypeList = json.subReqTypeList;
			for(i in subReqTypeList){
				$target.append("<option value='" + subReqTypeList[i].subReqTypeCd +"'>" + subReqTypeList[i].subReqTypeNm + "</option>");
			}
			refreshSelect($target);
		};
		getCodeList(url, param, callback);
	}

	function getCodeList(url, param, callback){
		if($("#accountId").val() != ""){
			$.ajax({
				type:"post",
				async:false,
				url:getUrl(url),
				dataType:"json",
				cache:false,
				data:param,
				contentType:"application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8",
				beforeSend:
					function() {
					},
				complete:
					function() {
					},
				success:
					function(json) {
						callback(json);
					},
				error:
					function(request, status, error) {
						alert(error);
					}
			});
		}
	}

	function getCategoryParam(idx){
		var baseClassNm = RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + idx;
		var key = null;
		var value = null;

		var param = {
				"accountId" : $("#accountId").val()
		};

		$("[class^=" + RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + "]").each(function(){
			var classNm = getClassNm(this, RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS);
			if(baseClassNm >= classNm){
				key = $(this).attr("id");
				value = $(this).val();
				param[key] = value;
			}
		});

		return param;
	}

	function getClassNm(obj, clsNm){
		var classNm = $.grep(obj.className.split(" "), function(v, i){
		       return v.indexOf(clsNm) === 0;
		}).join();
		return classNm;
	}

	function resetAccountInfo(obj){
		var orgMgrAct = $("#mgrAct").val();
		$("#mgrAct").val("Wating");
		
		getPriorityListByAccount();
		getSubReqTypeListByAccount();
		getCategoryListByAccount(obj, 0);
		getSwVerListByAccount();
		getAccountTicketDesc();
		getUsrDefFieldCreatePage();
		setInvisibleField();
		
		//Jio 특화 필드
		setSpecializtionInvisible();
		
		$("#mgrAct").val(orgMgrAct);
	}

	function resetSelectBox($obj){
		$obj.empty();
		$obj.append('<option value="">-- Select --</option>');
		$obj.val("");
		refreshSelect($obj);
	}

	function setAjaxForm(url){
		$("#mainForm").ajaxForm({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl(url),
			dataType:"json",
			cache:false,
			beforeSubmit:
				function(arr, form, options) {
				},
			success:
				function(json) {
					var result = json.result;
					var message = json.message;
					var item = json.item;
					var tempYn = json.tempYn;
					var ticketNo = json.ticketNo;
					var ticketNoEnc = json.ticketNoEnc;
					var method  = "";
					var msg = "";
					if(result == "0") {
						var bizUnitCd = $("#bizUnitCd").val();
						var reqTypeCd = $("#reqTypeCd").val();
						
						// harman bkwon81.kim add start
						obsMergeCheckFile();
						// harman bkwon81.kim add end

						if(tempYn == "Y") {
							method = "getMgrTicketCreateProblemPage";
							msg = 'Ticket has been saved <br/>TicketNo : ';
							/*
							if(reqTypeCd == "07"){
								method = "getMgrTicketCreateServiceRequestPage";
							}*/
						} else {
							method = "getMgrTicketModifyProblemPage";
							msg = 'Ticket has been created <br/>TicketNo : ';
							/*
							if(reqTypeCd == "07"){
								method = "getMgrTicketModifyServiceRequestPage";
							}*/
						}

						openPopupMessage(msg + ticketNo, function() {
							url =  getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=" + method + "&bizUnitCd=" + bizUnitCd + "&reqTypeCd=" + reqTypeCd+  "&ticketNo=" + ticketNoEnc);
							location.href = url;
						}, true);
						
					} else if(result == "101"){
						
						// harman bkwon81.kim add start
						obsCancleActN();
						// harman bkwon81.kim add end
						
						
						var bizUnitCd = $("#bizUnitCd").val();
						var reqTypeCd = $("#reqTypeCd").val();
						msg = 'Failed :<br/>' + message;
						
						if(tempYn == "Y") {
							method = "getMgrTicketCreateProblemPage";	
						} else {
							method = "getMgrTicketModifyProblemPage";
						}

						openPopupMessageAutoHeight(msg, function() {
							url =  getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=" + method + "&bizUnitCd=" + bizUnitCd + "&reqTypeCd=" + reqTypeCd+  "&ticketNo=" + ticketNoEnc);
							location.href = url;
						}, true);
						
					} else {
						
						// harman bkwon81.kim add start
						obsCancleActN();
						// harman bkwon81.kim add end
						
						openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Failed :<br/>' + message, function() {
							if(!isEmpty(item)) {
								setDisaabledOperator();
								$("#" + item).focus();
							}
						}, true);
					}
				},
			error:
				function(request, status, error) {
				
					// harman bkwon81.kim add start
					obsCancleActN();
					// harman bkwon81.kim add end
					
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>' + error, function() {
						setDisaabledOperator();
					}, true);
				}
			,complete:
				function() {
				}
		});
	}
	
	function setDisaabledOperator(){
		if($("#alreadyItsMe").val() != "Y"){
			$("#accountId").prop('disabled', true);
		}
	}
	
	function setModifyFormAjax(url){
		$("#mainForm").ajaxForm({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl(url),
			dataType:"json",
			cache:false,
			beforeSubmit:
				function(arr, form, options) {
				},
			success:
				function(json) {
					var result = json.result;
					var message = json.message;
					var item = json.item;
					var reqTypeCd = $("#reqTypeCd").val();
					var rsSaveMsg = 'Resolution Report has been saved.';
					var rsNotChgMsg = getMessage('{0} did not change because it has already been submit.', ['Resolution Report']);
					if(reqTypeCd == "09"){
						rsSaveMsg = 'CR Tool Report has been saved.';
						rsNotChgMsg = getMessage('{0} did not change because it has already been submit.', ['CR Tool Report']);
					}

					if(result == "0") {
						if($("#rsltnSaveAct").val() == "Y" && reqTypeCd != "09"){
							
							var resolutionId = json.resolutionId;
							var rstUpdateSummary = json.rstUpdateSummary;
							if($("#rsReportOpen").val() == "Y"){
								openPopupMessage(rsSaveMsg, function() {
									//$("#resolutionSummary").load(getUrl("/ts/ticket/resolutionReportNw.do?method=getResolutionSummaryPage&ticketNo=wo50mRP4r2TAOGIIruINZoMHFtATAOGEETAOGEE&resolutionId=" + resolutionId));
									//callResolutionReport();
									$("#resolutionSummaryBtn").trigger("click");
								}, true);
								/*
								$("#resolutionSummary").load(getUrl("/ts/ticket/resolutionReportNw.do?method=getResolutionSummaryPage&ticketNo=wo50mRP4r2TAOGIIruINZoMHFtATAOGEETAOGEE&resolutionId=" + resolutionId), function(){
								}, true);*/
							}else{
								if(rstUpdateSummary == 0){
									openPopupMessage(rsNotChgMsg, function() {
										//$("#resolutionSummary").load(getUrl("/ts/ticket/resolutionReportNw.do?method=getResolutionSummaryPage&ticketNo=wo50mRP4r2TAOGIIruINZoMHFtATAOGEETAOGEE&resolutionId=" + resolutionId));
									}, true);
								}else{
									openPopupMessage(rsSaveMsg, function() {
										//$("#resolutionSummary").load(getUrl("/ts/ticket/resolutionReportNw.do?method=getResolutionSummaryPage&ticketNo=wo50mRP4r2TAOGIIruINZoMHFtATAOGEETAOGEE&resolutionId=" + resolutionId));
									}, true);
								}
							}
						}else{
							var item = json.item;
							var ticketNo = json.ticketNo;
							var rstUpdateSummary = json.rstUpdateSummary;
							var msg = 'Ticket has been applied <br/>TicketNo : ' + ticketNo;
							var ticketNoEnc = json.ticketNoEnc;
							
							// harman bkwon81.kim add start
							obsMergeCheckFile();
							// harman bkwon81.kim add end
							
							if(rstUpdateSummary == 0){
								msg += '<br/>'+rsNotChgMsg;
								openPopupMessage180(msg, function() {
									//location.reload();
									reloadTicketFormPage("m", ticketNoEnc);
								}, true);
							}else{
								openPopupMessage(msg, function() {
									//location.reload();
									reloadTicketFormPage("m", ticketNoEnc);
								}, true);
							}
						}
					} else if(result == "101"){
						
						var ticketNoEnc = json.ticketNoEnc;
						msg = 'Failed :<br/>' + message;
						
						// harman bkwon81.kim add start
						obsCancleActN();
						// harman bkwon81.kim add end
							
						openPopupMessage180(msg, function() {
							//location.reload();
							reloadTicketFormPage("m", ticketNoEnc);
						}, true);
					} else {
						
						// harman bkwon81.kim add start
						obsCancleActN();
						// harman bkwon81.kim add end
						
						openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Failed :<br/>' + message, function() {
							if(!isEmpty(item)) {
								openItemPanel(item);
								$("#" + item).focus();
							}
						}, true);
					}
				},
			error:
				function(request, status, error) {
				
					// harman bkwon81.kim add start
					obsCancleAct();
					// harman bkwon81.kim add end
					
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>' + error, function() {
						
					}, true);
				}
			,complete:
				function() {
					initTicketFieldAuth(); 
				}
		});
	}

	function setResetableCategory(selUseYn){
		if(selUseYn == "Y"){
			$("[class^=" + RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + "]").selectmenu({
				change:function(event, ui) {
					var classNm = getClassNm(this, RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS);
					var classIdx = classNm.replace(RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS, "");
					getCategoryListByAccount(this, classIdx);
				},
				position:{
					   my:"left top",
					   at:"left bottom"
				}
			});

			selectMenuUseYn  = "Y";
		}else{
			$("[class^=" + RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS + "]").change(function(event, ui) {
					var classNm = getClassNm(this, RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS);
					var classIdx = classNm.replace(RESETABLE_CATE_CLASS, "");
					getCategoryListByAccount(this, classIdx);
			});
		}
	}

	function validatePriority(){
		var ret = true;

		$("#priorityForm :input[data-required]").each(function(){
			var objId = $(this).attr("id");
			var fieldNm = $(this).attr("title");
			var msg = '{0} is required';
			msg = getMessage(msg, [fieldNm]);

			if(checkEmpty(objId, msg)) {
				ret = false;
				if($(this).prop("tagName") == "SELECT"){
					//$(this).selectmenu("open");
				}
				return false;
			}
		});

		if(ret){
			var approver = 'Approver';
			var msg = '{0} is required';
			msg = getMessage(msg, [approver]);
			if(checkEmpty("approvalUserId", msg)){
				$("#approver").focus();
				ret = false;
			}
		}
		return ret;
	}

	function setChangePriorityForm(){
		$("#priorityForm input").on('keydown', function (e) {
			if (e.keyCode === 13) {
				e.preventDefault();
			}
		});
		
		$("#priorityChgBtn").click(function(){
			openChangePriorityPopup();
		});

		$("#priorityForm select[name=priorityCd]").change(function(){
			$("#priorityForm #priorityNm").val($("#priorityForm select[name=priorityCd] option:selected").text());
		});

		$("#btnResetApprover").click(function(){
			$("#approver").attr("disabled", false);
			$("#approver").val("");
			$("#approvalUserId").val("");
			$("#approvalUserEmail").val("");
			$(this).attr("disabled", true);
			$(this).addClass("disable");
		});

		if($("#approver").val() == ""){
			$("#btnResetApprover").attr("disabled", true);
			$("#btnResetApprover").addClass("disable");
		}else{
			$("#approver").attr("disabled", true);
			//$("#btnResetApprover").addClass("disabled");
		}

		$("#priorityForm").ajaxForm({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=createChangePriorityRequest"),
			dataType:"json",
			cache:false,
			beforeSubmit:
				function(arr, form, options) {
				},
			success:
				function(json) {
					var result = json.result;
					if(result == "0") {
						openPopupMessage('Successfully saved.', function() {
							location.reload();
						});
					} else {
						openPopupMessage('An error occurred.');
					}
				},
			error:
				function(request, status, error) {
					alert(error);
				}
			,complete:
				function(request, status, error) {
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
					}, true);
				}
		});

		$("#approver").autocomplete({
			source : function(request, response) {
					$.ajax({
					url		: getUrl("/ts/autocomplete.do?method=autocomplete"),
					type		: 'post',
					dataType	: 'json',
					data			: {
						"autoId"	: "T23"
						, "condition1":$("#approver").val()
					},
					success : function(data) {
						response($.map(data, function (c) {
							return {
								label : c.userNm + "(" +  c.emailAddr + ")",
								value: c.userNm,
								approvalUserId :  c.userId,
								emailAddr : c.emailAddr
							};
						}));
					},
					error : function(data) {
						openPopupMessage('Error :<br/>',  function() {
						});
					}
				});
			},
			minLength: 1,
			select: function( event, ui ) {
				$("#approvalUserId").val(ui.item.approvalUserId);
				$("#approvalUserEmail").val(ui.item.emailAddr);
				$("#btnResetApprover").attr("disabled", false);
				$("#btnResetApprover").removeClass("disable");
				$("#approver").attr("disabled", true);
			}
		}).click(function(){
			$(this).autocomplete("search");
		});

		$("#prioritySubmitBtn").click(function(){
			if(!validatePriority()){
				return false;
			}
			$("#priorityDiv").hide();
			$("#priorityForm").submit();
		});
	}

	function setChangePriorityAppForm(){
		$("#priorityAppForm #approvalStatusCd01").click(function(){
			var $obj = $("#priorityAppForm #approvalRejectReason");
			$obj.val('');
		});

		$("#priorityAppForm #approvalStatusCd02").click(function(){
			var $obj = $("#priorityAppForm #approvalRejectReason");
			$obj.focus();
		});

		$("#priorityAppForm").ajaxForm({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=approveChangePriority"),
			dataType:"json",
			cache:false,
			beforeSubmit:
				function(arr, form, options) {
				},
			success:
				function(json) {
					var result = json.result;
					if(result == "0") {
						openPopupMessage('Successfully saved.', function() {
							location.reload();
						});
					} else {
						openPopupMessage('An error occurred.');
					}
				},
			error:
				function(request, status, error) {
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
					}, true);
				}
			,complete:function() {
			}
		});

		$("#priorityAppSubmitBtn").click(function(){
			if(!validatePriorityApp()){
				return false;
			}
			$("#priorityDiv").hide();
			$("#priorityAppForm").submit();
		});
	}

	function validatePriorityApp(){
		if($("#priorityAppForm input[name=approvalStatusCd]:checked").length == 0){
			openPopupMessage('Select accept or reject.');

			return false;
		}

		if($("#priorityAppForm  input[name=approvalStatusCd]:checked").val()  == "R"){
			if($("#priorityAppForm #approvalRejectReason").val()  == ""){
				openPopupMessage('Please enter a reason for rejection.');
				return false;
			}
		}

		return true;
	}

	function openChangePriorityPopup(){
		 var option = {
			layer:"priorityDiv",
			element:{id:"priorityChgBtn", orientation:"right"},
			modal:true,
			closeBtn:"pChangeCloseBtn"
		};

		 popupElementLayer(option);
	}

	function refreshSelect($obj){
		if(selectMenuUseYn == "Y"){
			$obj.selectmenu("refresh");
		}
	}

	function initAccountData(){
		$("#reqestorId").val("UR-0342333");
		$("#secorgId").val("SIEL");
		$("#countryCd").val("IN");
		$("#accountId").val("201505061121314029220000000000635970");
		$("#accountId").selectmenu("refresh");
		setRelatedTicketNo();
	}	
	
	function autocompletCiCode(){
		$("#ciCd").autocomplete({
			source : function(request, response) {
				$.ajax({
					url		: getUrl("/ts/autocomplete.do?method=autocomplete"),
					type		: 'post',
					dataType : 'json',
					data : {
						  "autoId"		: "T29"
						 , "condition1": $("#ciCd").val()
						 },
					success : function(data) {
						response($.map(data, function (c) {
							return {
								label : c.ciCode,
								value: c.ciCode,
							};
						}));
					},
					error : function(data) {
						openPopupMessage('Error :<br/>',  function() {
						});
					}
				});
			},
			minLength: 1
		}).click(function(){
			$(this).autocomplete("search");
			});
	}
	
	function callCiCodePopup(){
		
		
		$("#btnCiCodePop").click(function() {
			
			var ciCd = $("#ciCd").val();
			if(checkEmpty("ciCd", getMessage('{0} is required', ['Site ID']))){
				$("#ciCd").focus();
				return false;
			}
			
			if($("#ciCodePopupLayer").length == 0) {
				var option = {
					layer:"ciCodePopupLayer",
					element:{id:"btnCiCodePop", orientation:"right"},
					ajaxCall:true,
					url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=getCiCodeInfo&ciCd=" + ciCd),
					closeBtn:"ciCodeCloseBtn",
					closeLayer:true
				};

				popupElementLayer(option);
				setTimeout(setLayerLocation($("#ciCodePopupLayer")), 1000);
				
				$(".fixed_ticket_left").scroll(function() {
					$("#ciCodePopupLayer").remove();
				});
				
			
			} else {
				$("#ciCodePopupLayer").remove();
			}
		});
		
	}
	
	function callResolutionReport(){
		if($("#resolutionReport").length == 0) {
			var url = getUrl("/ts/ticket/resolutionReportNw.do?method=getResolutionReportPage&ticketNo=") + $("#ticketNo").val();
			var targetLayer = "resolutionReport";
			
			$("<div id=\"resolutionReport\" class=\"layerPopup popupLayer createdLayer\"></div>").appendTo("body").hide();

			var option = {
				layer:targetLayer,
				css:true,
				element:{id:"slider_right", orientation:"left"},
				ajaxCall:true,
				url:url,
				closeBtn:"closePopup",
				confirmBtn:"confirmPopup",
				func:function() { }
			};
			popupElementLayer(option);
		} else {
			$("#resolutionReport").remove();
		}
	}
	
	function faultCauseShow(){
		if($("#faultSymptomCd").val() == undefined || $("#faultSymptomCd").val() == null ||  $("#faultSymptomCd").val() =="" ||$("#faultSymptomCd").val() == "500"){
			$(".faultCauseVisibility").hide();
			$("#faultCause").val("");
		}else{
			$(".faultCauseVisibility").show();
		}
	}
	
	function setSpecializtionInvisible(){
		var jioAccnt = "201505061121314029220000000000635970";
		
		if( $("#accountId").val() == jioAccnt && $("#reqTypeCd").val() == "02"){
			$(".relatedIncdntTicketNoVisibility").show();
			$("[name=incdntMandatoryYn]").attr('disabled', false);
			
			if($("input:radio[name=incdntMandatoryYn]:checked").val() != 'N' ){
				$("input:radio[name=incdntMandatoryYn][value='Y']").prop("checked", true);
				$("input:radio[name=incdntMandatoryYn]:checked").val("Y");
			}
		}else{
			$(".relatedIncdntTicketNoVisibility").hide();
			$("#relatedIncdntTicketNo").val("");
		
			$("input:radio[name=incdntMandatoryYn]:checked").val("");

		}
	}
	
	function setRelatedTicketNo(){
		var availableAccountId = "201405241024587378780000000001079504";//Verizon
		var availableAccountId2 = "202206270901000000000000000001050001";//DISH
		var availableAccountId3 = "202009242356177325120000000001049481";//Telus
		var accountId =$("#accountId").val();
		var relatedTicketNo =$("#relatedTicketNo").val();
		if(relatedTicketNo  != null && relatedTicketNo != ""){
			// 등록된 accountId 와 선택한 accountId 가 다를 경우 
			//verizon 일 경우 값이 숫자가 아니면  null 값 셋팅.!validation.isNumber(str)

			// H4SEC-298
			// Telus : Verizon Remedy IF 적용 전 로직 적용
			// Remedy IF 적용 전과 후의 변경 사항 없어서 account id만 추가함
			if(  (accountId == availableAccountId || accountId == availableAccountId3)  && ($("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02') ){
				if( !validation.isNumber(relatedTicketNo) ){
					$("#relatedTicketNo").val("");
				}else{
					$("#relatedTicketNo").val(relatedTicketNo.substring(0, 8));
				}
			//DISH 일 경우 값이 숫자가 아니면  null 값 셋팅.!validation.isNumber(str)
			} else if( accountId == availableAccountId2  && $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02' ){
				if( !validation.isNumber(relatedTicketNo) ){
					$("#relatedTicketNo").val("");
				}else{
					$("#relatedTicketNo").val(relatedTicketNo.substring(0, 8));
				}
			}else{
				$("#relatedTicketNo").val(relatedTicketNo);
			}
		}
		
		//data-*  최초 바인딩 된 상태만 기억하므로 동적체크가 어려워 
		//relatedTicketNo에 keyup function checkNumber 를 추가 한다. 
		
		// H4SEC-298
		// Telus : Verizon Remedy IF 적용 전 로직 적용
		// Remedy IF 적용 전과 후의 변경 사항 없어서 account id만 추가함
		
		if(  (accountId == availableAccountId || accountId == availableAccountId3) && ($("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02') ){
			// 필수체크 - 티켓 등록화면만 * 표 체크 
			if ($("#pntSpan_relatedTicketNo").length > 0) {
				$("#pntSpan_relatedTicketNo").text("*");
			}
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr("data-required","");
			
			//data-checknumber를 동적으로 적용된 것을 인식하지 못하므로 relatedTicketNo에 keyup function checkNumber 를 추가 한다. 
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr('dynamiclength', 8);
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr("placeholder","Enter 8 digits Number");
			
			if ($("#questionSpan_relatedTicketNo").length > 0) {
				$("#questionSpan_relatedTicketNo").show();
			}
			
		} else if( accountId == availableAccountId2  && $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02' ){
			// 필수체크 - 티켓 등록화면만 * 표 체크 
			if ($("#pntSpan_relatedTicketNo").length > 0) {
				$("#pntSpan_relatedTicketNo").text("*");
			}
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr("data-required","");
			
			//data-checknumber를 동적으로 적용된 것을 인식하지 못하므로 relatedTicketNo에 keyup function checkNumber 를 추가 한다. 
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr('dynamiclength', 8);
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr("placeholder","Enter 8 digits Number");
			
			if ($("#questionSpan_relatedTicketNo").length > 0) {
				$("#questionSpan_relatedTicketNo").show();
			}
		}else{
			// 필수해제  - 티켓 등록화면만 * 표 체크 
			if ($("#pntSpan_relatedTicketNo").length > 0) {
				$("#pntSpan_relatedTicketNo").text("");
			}
			$("#relatedTicketNo").removeAttr("data-required");
			
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr('dynamiclength', 40);
			$("#relatedTicketNo").attr("placeholder","");
			
			if ($("#questionSpan_relatedTicketNo").length > 0) {
				$("#questionSpan_relatedTicketNo").hide();
			}
		}
	}

	function validateRelatedTicketNo(){
		var selectedAccountId = $("#accountId").val();
		var availableAccountId = '201405241024587378780000000001079504';//Verizon
		var availableAccountId2 = "202206270901000000000000000001050001";//DISH
		var availableAccountId3 = "202009242356177325120000000001049481";//Telus
		var result = true;
		if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId  && ($("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02') ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			
			// harman bkwon81.kim modify start
			/*			
			//범위가 00000001 ~ 99999999
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < 1  || intRelatedTicketNo > 100000000){
					result =  false;
				}
			}			
			*/
			
			//범위가 88888800 ~ 88888889
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < 88888800  || intRelatedTicketNo > 88888889){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
			// harman bkwon81.kim modify end
		}
		else if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId2  && $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02' ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			//범위가 88888800 ~ 88888899
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < 88888800  || intRelatedTicketNo > 88888899){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		// H4SEC-298
		// Telus : Verizon Remedy IF 적용 전 로직 적용
		else if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId3  && ($("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCdTxt").val() == '02') ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			//범위가 00000001 ~ 99999999
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < 1  || intRelatedTicketNo > 100000000){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		
		return result;
	}
	
	function validateRelatedTicketNo2(){  //mgr Ticket 수정화면 전용
		var selectedAccountId = $("#accountId").val();
		var availableAccountId = '201405241024587378780000000001079504';//Verizon
		var availableAccountId2 = "202206270901000000000000000001050001";//DISH
		var availableAccountId3 = "202009242356177325120000000001049481";//Telus
		var result = true;
		
		// H4SEC-298
		// Telus : Verizon Remedy IF 적용 전 로직 적용
		// Remedy IF 적용 전과 후의 변경 사항 없어서 account id만 추가함		
		if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && (selectedAccountId == availableAccountId || selectedAccountId == availableAccountId3) && ($("#reqTypeCd").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCd").val() == '02') ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");

			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			//범위가 00000001 ~ 99999999
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < 1  || intRelatedTicketNo > 100000000){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		else if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId2  && $("#reqTypeCd").val() == '02' ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			//범위가 88888800 ~ 88888899
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;

					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		
		return result;
	}

	function validateRelatedTicketNo3(){  //mgr Ticket 수정화면 전용2 
		var selectedAccountId = $("#accountId").val();
		var availableAccountId = '201405241024587378780000000001079504';//Verizon
		var availableAccountId2 = "202206270901000000000000000001050001";//DISH
		var availableAccountId3 = "202009242356177325120000000001049481";//Telus
		var result = true;
		if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId  && ($("#reqTypeCd").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCd").val() == '02') ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			//범위가 가변적
			var startRelatedTicketNo = 0;
			var endRelatedTicketNo = 0;
			
			
			
			
			
			// Remedy I/F 연계전 티켓을 처리하기 위하여 추가
			var bRelatedTicketNo = "IM367817883";
			var nbRelatedTicketNo = 0;
			if(bRelatedTicketNo != "" ){
				nbRelatedTicketNo = Number(bRelatedTicketNo);
			}
			
			if(nbRelatedTicketNo < 88888800){
				startRelatedTicketNo = 1;
				endRelatedTicketNo = 88888799;
			} else {			
				startRelatedTicketNo = 88888800;
				endRelatedTicketNo = 88888889;
			}
			
			
			
			
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < startRelatedTicketNo  || intRelatedTicketNo > endRelatedTicketNo){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		else if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId2  && $("#reqTypeCd").val() == '02' ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			
			//범위가 가변적
			var startRelatedTicketNo = 0;
			var endRelatedTicketNo = 0;
			// ticketMasterNwVO.relatedTicketNo
			
			
			
			
			// Remedy I/F 연계전 티켓을 처리하기 위하여 추가
			var bRelatedTicketNo = "IM367817883";
			var nbRelatedTicketNo = 0;
			if(bRelatedTicketNo != "" ){
				nbRelatedTicketNo = Number(bRelatedTicketNo);
			}
			
			if(nbRelatedTicketNo < 88888800){
				startRelatedTicketNo = 1;
				endRelatedTicketNo = 88888799;
			} else {			
				startRelatedTicketNo = 88888800;
				endRelatedTicketNo = 88888889;
			}
			
			
			
			
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 || !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < startRelatedTicketNo  || intRelatedTicketNo > endRelatedTicketNo){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		
		// H4SEC-298
		// Telus : Verizon Remedy IF 적용 전 로직 적용
		if(selectedAccountId.length > 0 && selectedAccountId == availableAccountId3  && ($("#reqTypeCd").val() == '01' || $("#reqTypeCd").val() == '02') ){
			trimSet("relatedTicketNo");
			var relatedTicketNo = $("#relatedTicketNo").val();
			if(checkEmpty("relatedTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Customer Ticket ID']))) {
				result =  false;
			}
			//범위가 00000001 ~ 99999999
			if(relatedTicketNo != null && relatedTicketNo != '' ){
				var intRelatedTicketNo = parseInt(relatedTicketNo);
				var pattern = /^\d+$/; //숫자인지 /^\d+$/;
				if(relatedTicketNo.length > 8 ||  !pattern.test(relatedTicketNo) ||  intRelatedTicketNo < 1  || intRelatedTicketNo > 100000000){
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		}
		
		return result;
	}
	// harman bkwon81.kim add end
	
	function validateRelatedIncdntTicket(){
		
		// Related Incident Chceck 
		var jioAccnt = "201505061121314029220000000000635970";
		var result = true;
		
		if( $("#accountId").val() == jioAccnt && $("#reqTypeCd").val() == "02"){
			
			trimSet("relatedIncdntTicketNo");
			var incdntMandatoryYn = $("input:radio[name=incdntMandatoryYn]:checked").val();
			var relatedIncdntTicketNo = $("#relatedIncdntTicketNo").val();
			
			if(incdntMandatoryYn == 'Y'){ // 필수값 체크
				
				if(checkEmpty("relatedIncdntTicketNo", getMessage('Please enter {0} information.', ['Related Incident Ticket Already Exists']))) {
					result =  false;
				}
			}
		
			//check validation ticket
			if(relatedIncdntTicketNo != null && relatedIncdntTicketNo != ''){
				
				var isValid = checkRelatedIncdntTicket(relatedIncdntTicketNo);
				if(!isValid){
					var msg = 'Check to Related Incident Ticket ID.';
					openPopupMessage(msg,  function() {$("#relatedIncdntTicketNo").focus();});
					return false;
				}
			
			}
		}
		
		return result;
	}
	
	function checkRelatedIncdntTicket(ticketNo){
		var isValid = false;
		
		$.ajax({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=checkRelatedIncdntTicket"),
			dataType:"json",
			data:{
				relatedIncdntTicketNo:$("#relatedIncdntTicketNo").val()
			},
			cache:false,
			contentType:"application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8",
			beforeSend:function() {
			},
			complete:function() {
			},
			success:function(json) {
				var result = json.result;
				if(result == "2") {
					isValid = true;
				}
			},
			error:function(request, status, error) {

			}
		});
		
		return isValid;
	}
	
	function itsMeNws(){
		//console.log("mgrTicketNwSCommon itsMeNws in ");
		if(!validateReqTypeCd()){//Product Group, Request Type 유효성 체크
			return;
		}

		var reqId = "uDebWvoKyazD6yJN4Epp7wTAOGEETAOGEE";
		var reqNm = "Rajneesh ****";
		var emailAddr = "rajneesh.r@samsung.com";
		var singleId = "rajneesh.r";
		var userLoginId = "rajneesh.r";
		var secorgId = "";
		var countryCd = "";
		var telNo1 = "";
		var telNo2 = "";
		var telNo = telNo2 + '-' + telNo1;
		var accountNm = 'Internal';
		var accountId = '';
		if(singleId == '') 
			singleId = userLoginId;
		
		if($("#alreadyItsMe").val() != "Y"){
			displayRequesterInfo(reqId, reqNm, emailAddr, singleId, secorgId, countryCd, telNo, accountNm, accountId);
			
			$("#accountId").selectmenu({
				disabled: false
			});
			resetAccountInfo($("#accountId"));
		}
		$("#alreadyItsMe").val("Y");
	}

	
	function displayRequesterInfo(reqId, reqNm, emailAddr, singleId, secorgId, countryCd, telNo, accountNm, accountId){
		// 값 초기화
		$("#requesterInfo :input").each(function(){
			$(this).val("");
		});

		$("#reqesterKeyword").val(reqNm);
		$("#reqestorNm").val(reqNm);
		$("#reqestorId").val(reqId);
		$("#secorgId").val(secorgId);
		$("#countryCd").val(countryCd);
		$("#reqestorCompanyNm").val(accountNm);
		$("#reqestorEmailAddr").val(emailAddr);
		$("#reqestorSingleId").val(singleId);
		$("#reqestorPhone").val(telNo);
		$("#accountId").val(accountId);	
		$("#accountId").selectmenu( "refresh" );
		
		setDisableRequesterNwS();
		resetAccountInfo($("#accountId"));
		
		if(countryCd != ""){
			refershAssigneeList();
		}else{
			var assignee = $("#assignee");
			assignee.find("option").remove();
			assignee.append($("<option value=''></option>"));
			$("#assignee").selectmenu("refresh");
		}
	}
	
	function resetAccountForm(){
		$("#accountId").val("");	
		$("#accountId").selectmenu( "refresh" );
		$("#accountId").selectmenu({
			disabled: true
		});
	}
	
	function setAccountInfo(){
		var index = $("#accountId option").index($("#accountId option:selected"));
		
		$("#secorgId").prop('selectedIndex', index);
		$("#countryCd").prop('selectedIndex', index);
		
		refershAssigneeList();
	}
	
	
	function setLayerLocation($layer){
		var scrollTop = $(document).scrollTop();
		
		var windowHeight = $(window).height() ;
		var layerHeight = $layer.height();
		
		var offset = $layer.offset();
		var offTop = offset.top;
		
		if((offTop + layerHeight) > windowHeight - 20){
			var top = windowHeight - layerHeight - 60;
			$layer.css({"top" : top});
			//$layer.css({"bottom" : "40px"});
		}
	}
