	function makeApprovalHtml(type, requested, approverNm, approverEmail, approvalLastUpdateDttm){
		var approvalType = type.substring(0, 1).toUpperCase();
		var html = '';
		html += '	<div id="' + type + 'ApprovalInfo" class="elm_pop_wrap layerPopup">';
		html += '	<div class="tit">&nbsp;<img id="' + type + 'CloseBtn" class="closeBtn1 ' + type + 'CloseBtn" src="/b2t/images/btsp/common/popup_closeBtn.gif" alt="Close"  style="cursor:pointer"/></div>';
		html += '	<div class="elm_pop_cont">';
		html += '		<dl class="formBox">';
		html += '			<dt>Requested</dt>';
		html += '			<dd>' + requested + '</dd>';
		html += '			<dt>Approver</dt>';
		html += '			<dd>';
		html += 				approverNm +'(' + approverEmail + ')';
		html += '			</dd>';
		html += '		</dl>';
		html += '		<div class="popupBtnWrap">';
		html += '			<input type="hidden" value="'+ approvalLastUpdateDttm +'" id="approvalLastUpdateDttm"/>';
		
		html += '			<button type="button" class="btn_cancel ' + type + 'CloseBtn">Close</button>';
		html += '		</div>';
		html += '	</div>';
		html += '</div>';
		
		$(html).appendTo("body").hide();
	}
	
	function openApproverInfoPopup(type, elementId, orientation){
		 var option = {
			layer: type + "ApprovalInfo",
			element:{id:elementId, orientation:orientation},
			closeBtn: type + "CloseBtn"
		};

		popupElementLayer(option);
		setTimeout(setLayerLocation($("#" + type + "ApprovalInfo")), 1000);
		
		$(".fixed_ticket_left").scroll(function() {
			$("#priorityApprovalInfo").hide();
		});
		$(".spread_right").scroll(function() {
			$("#resolutionApprovalInfo").hide();
		});
		$("#resolutionSummaryCloseBtn").click(function() {
			$("#resolutionApprovalInfo").hide();
		});
		
	}

	function withdraw(type){
		if(type == "R"){
			$("#resolutionApprovalInfo").hide();
		}else if(type == "P"){
			$("#priorityApprovalInfo").hide();
		}
		
		openPopupMessageConfirm('Are you sure to withdraw?', function() {
			openProgressLoadingBar(function() {
				execWithdraw(type);
			});
		});
	}
	
	function execWithdraw(type){
		var param =	{
				"cfmAprvLastUpdateDttm" :  $("#approvalLastUpdateDttm").val()
				,"approvalTypeCd" : type
				,"ticketNo" : $("#ticketNo").val()
		};
		$.ajax({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticket/ticketApproval.do?method=withdrawApproval"),
			data : param,
			dataType:"json",
			cache:false,
			before:
				function(arr,form,options){
				},
			success:
				function(json){
					var result = json.result;
					var resultMessage = json.message;
					openPopupMessage(resultMessage, function(){
						location.reload();
						if(type == "R"){
							opener.reloadTicketModifyPage();
						}
					}, true);
					
				},
			complete:
				function(){
			},
			error:
				function(request, status,error){
					//openPopupMessage('Error.', function(){
					//}, true);
					
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'+ error, function() {
					}, true);
					
				}
		});
	}
	
	var swVerList = [];
	function autocompletSwVer(){
		
			
				swVerList.push("C-IoT_9.4.0");
			
				swVerList.push("EPC_8.0.0");
			
				swVerList.push("EPC_8.5.0");
			
				swVerList.push("EPC_9.2.0");
			
				swVerList.push("EPC_9.3.0");
			
				swVerList.push("EPC_9.4.0");
			
				swVerList.push("SLR9.0.0");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR21D");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR22B");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR22C");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR22D");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR23A");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR23B");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR24A");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR24B");
			
				swVerList.push("SVR25B");
			
				swVerList.push("The others");
			
		

		$("#softwareVer").autocomplete({
			source : function(request, response) {
				var matcher = new RegExp( $.ui.autocomplete.escapeRegex( request.term ), "i" );
				response($.map(swVerList, function (item) {
					if(matcher.test(item) == true) {
						var regex = new RegExp("(?![^&;]+;)(?!<[^<>]*)(" + request.term.replace(/([\^$\(\)\[\]\{\}\*\.\+\?\|\\])/gi, "\$1") + ")(?![^<>]*>)(?![^&;]+;)", "gi");
						return {
							label: (item).replace(regex, "<strong><font color='red'>$1</font></strong>"),
							id: item,
							value: item};
						}
					}));
				},
			minLength: 0
		}).click(function(){
			$(this).autocomplete("search");
		}).data('ui-autocomplete')._renderItem = function( ul, item ) {
			return $("<li></li>").data("ui-autocomplete-item", item).append('<a>' + item.label + '</a>').appendTo( ul );
		};
	}
	
	function changeInternalPriority(){	
		$("#changeInternalPriorityLayer").hide();
		
		openProgressLoadingBar(function() {
			var param =	{
									"ticketNo" : $("#ticketNo").val(),
									"insidePriorityCd" : $("#chgInsidePriorityCd").val()
								};
			$.ajax({
				type:"post",
				async:false,
				url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=changeInternalPriority"),
				data : param,
				dataType:"json",
				cache:false,
				before:
					function(arr, form, options) {
					},
				success:
					function(json) {
						var result = json.result;
						if(result == "0") {
							openPopupMessage('Successfully saved.', function() {
								location.reload();
							});
						} else {
							openPopupMessage('An error occurred.', function(){}, true);
						}
					},
				error:
					function(request, status, error) {
						openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
						}, true);
					}
				,complete:function() {
				}
			});
		});
		
	}

	function confirmChgPriority(){
		if(checkEmpty("chgPriorityCd", getMessage('{0} is required', ['Priority']))){
			return false;
		}
		$("#changePriorityLayer").hide();
		var fromP = $("#_priorityNm").val();
		var toP = $("#chgPriorityCd option:selected").text();
		openPopupMessageConfirm('Are you sure you want to change priority?' + "<b2/>From " + fromP + " To " + toP, function() {
				executeChgPriority();
			}, function() {
				$("#changePriorityLayer").show();
			}
		);
	}
	
	function executeChgPriority(){
		openProgressLoadingBar(function() {
			var param =	{
					"ticketNo" : $("#ticketNo").val(),
					"priorityCd" : $("#chgPriorityCd").val(),
					"priorityNm" : $("#chgPriorityCd option:selected").text(),
			};
			
			$.ajax({
				type:"post",
				async:false,
				url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=changePriority"),
				data : param,
				dataType:"json",
				cache:false,
				before:
					function(arr, form, options) {
					},
				success:
					function(json) {
						var result = json.result;
						if(result == "0") {
							openPopupMessage('Successfully saved.', function() {
								reloadTicketFormPage("m", "wo50mRP4r2TAOGIIruINZoMHFtATAOGEETAOGEE");
							});
						} else {
							openPopupMessage('An error occurred.', function(){}, true);
						}
					},
				error:
					function(request, status, error) {
						openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
						}, true);
					}
				,complete:function() {
				}
			});
		});
		
	}
	
	function getAccountTicketDesc(){
		var availableAccountId = '201405241024587378780000000001079504';//Verizon
		var accountId  = $("#accountId").val();
		var reqTypeCd = $("#reqTypeCd").val();

		if(accountId.length == 0 || (accountId.length > 0 && reqTypeCd == "07")){	
			$("#commentContent").val("");
			cafe.setContent("cafeDemo", "");
				
		}else{
			var param = {
				"accountId" : $("#accountId").val()
			};
			
			$.ajax({
				type:"post",
				async:false,
				url:getUrl("/ts/ticketNwS.do?method=getAccountTicketDefaultDesc"),
				data : param,
				dataType:"json",
				cache:false,
				before:
					function(arr, form, options) {
					},
				success:
					function(json) {
						var ticketDefaultDesc = json.ticketDefaultDesc;
						var comment = $("#commentContent").val();
						cafe.setContent("cafeDemo", ticketDefaultDesc);
						if(!(comment == "<p>&nbsp;</p>" || comment == "")) {
							if(ticketDefaultDesc != ""){
								openPopupMessageUserDefineBtn('Description will not be saved in case of `Reset`. Otherwise, it will be kept. ' 
										,'Reset'
										,'Keep'
										, function() {
											$("#commentContent").val(ticketDefaultDesc);		
											trimSet("commentContent");											
												
										}, function() {}
								);
							}
						} else{
							$("#commentContent").val(ticketDefaultDesc);
							trimSet("commentContent");
								
						}
					},
				error:
					function(request, status, error) {
						openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
						}, true);
					}
				,complete:function() {
				}
			});
		}
	}
	
	function getUsrDefFieldCreatePage(){
		var orgMgrAct = $("#mgrAct").val();
		$("#mgrAct").val("Wating");
		
		var param = {
			"bizUnitCd" : $("#bizUnitCd").val(),
			"reqTypeCd" : $("#reqTypeCd").val(),
			"accountId" : $("#accountId").val(),
			"ticketNo" : $("#ticketNo").val()
		};
		$("#usrDefFieldArea").load(getUrl("/ts/ticketForm.do?method=geMgrtUsrDefFieldCreatePage"), param);
		
		$("#mgrAct").val(orgMgrAct);
	}
	
	function getUsrDefFieldModifyPage(){
		var param = {
			"ticketNo" : $("#ticketNo").val()
		};
		$("#usrDefFieldArea").load(getUrl("/ts/ticketForm.do?method=geMgrtUsrDefFieldModifyPage"), param);
	}
	
	function setInvisibleField(){
			var orgMgrAct = $("#mgrAct").val();
			$("#mgrAct").val("Wating");
			resetInvisibility();
			if($("#accountId").val() != ""){
				var param = {
					"bizUnitCd" : $("#bizUnitCd").val(),
					"reqTypeCd" : $("#reqTypeCd").val(),
					"accountId" : $("#accountId").val()
				};
				
				$.ajax({
					type:"post",
					async:false,
					url:getUrl("/ts/ticketForm.do?method=getInvisibleField"),
					data : param,
					dataType:"json",
					cache:false,
					before:
						function(arr, form, options) {
						},
					success:
						function(json) {
							var tkFormInvsblty = json.tkFormInvsblty;
							var tkFormInvsbltyDtlList = json.tkFormInvsbltyDtlList;
							
							if(tkFormInvsblty != undefined){
								$("#invisibilityId").val(tkFormInvsblty.invisibilityId);
								$("#invsbltyMgmtVer").val(tkFormInvsblty.mgmtVer);
							}
							hideInvisibleField(tkFormInvsbltyDtlList);
						},
					error:
						function(request, status, error) {
							openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
							}, true);
						}
					,complete:function() {
					}
				});
		 	}
		 	$("#mgrAct").val(orgMgrAct);
	}

	function resetInvisibility(){
		$("span[class$='Visibility']").each(function(){
			$(this).show();	
			$(this).data("invisible", "false");
			$(this).removeClass("invisibleWrap");
		});
	}
	
	function closeProgressLoadingBar(){
		if($("#progressLoadingBar").is(":visible")) {
			$("#progressLoadingBar").remove();
			hideMask();
		}
	}

	function hideInvisibleField(invibleList){
		var trhide1 = 0, trhide2 = 0, trhide3 = 0, tbhide = 0;
		if(invibleList != undefined){
			for(var i  in invibleList){
				//console.log(invibleList[i].fieldCd);
				if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="serviceImpactYn") trhide1++;
				else if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="sysImpactCd") trhide1++;
				else if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="issueTypeCd") trhide2++;
				else if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="issueCtgryCd") trhide2++;
				else if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="occurDt") trhide3++;
				else if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="faultSymptomCd") trhide3++;
				
				if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="faultCause") tbhide++;
				else if(invibleList[i].fieldCd=="faultSymptomCd") tbhide++;
				
				var $target = $("#" + invibleList[i].fieldCd);
				if(invibleList[i].defaultValCd != ""){
					
					$target.val(invibleList[i].defaultValCd );
					
				} else{
					$target.val("");
				}
				
				$target.data("invisible", "true");
				
				if($target.prop("tagName") == "SELECT"){
					refreshSelect($target);
				}
			
				$("." + invibleList[i].fieldCd + "Visibility").each(function(){
					$(this).hide();
					//$(this).addClass("invisibleWrap");
				});
			}
		}

 		if(trhide1==2)
			$('.trhide1').hide();
		else 
			$('.trhide1').show();
		if(trhide2==2)
			$('.trhide2').hide();
		else 
			$('.trhide2').show();
		if(trhide3==2)
			$('.trhide3').hide();
		else 
			$('.trhide3').show();
			
		if(tbhide==2)
			$('#tbhide').hide();
		else 
			$('#tbhide').show();
	}
	
	function setTicketInvisibleField(){
		var param = {
			"invisibilityId" : $("#invisibilityId").val(),
			"mgmtVer" : $("#invsbltyMgmtVer").val(),
			"accountId" : $("#accountId").val(),
		};
		
		$.ajax({
			type:"post",
			async:false,
			url:getUrl("/ts/ticketForm.do?method=getInvisibleFieldDtlList"),
			data : param,
			dataType:"json",
			cache:false,
			before:
				function(arr, form, options) {
				},
			success:
				function(json) {
					var tkFormInvsbltyDtlList = json.tkFormInvsbltyDtlList;
					
					if(tkFormInvsbltyDtlList != undefined){
						hideInvisibleField(tkFormInvsbltyDtlList);
					}
				},
			error:
				function(request, status, error) {
					openPopupMessageAutoHeight('Error :<br/>'  + error, function() {
					}, true);
				}
			,complete:function() {
			}
		});
	}

	}
